status: 400 }\n    48→    );\n    49→  }\n    50→\n    51→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    52→    telegramLink.trim(),\n    53→    listingId\n    54→  );\n    55→\n    56→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    57→}\n    58→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_011RmKHxCBNQZ9vfdN7DDnQq","session_id":"e0175717-b3d2-4a20-ae78-d8dc36390c5a","uuid":"769b5459-be90-48ec-ac84-9eaa7a6bb566","timestamp":"2026-03-23T23:02:06.338Z"}

* GET /api/listings/[id]/auto-telegram\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Returns the Telegram deep link for one-click group creation.\n    10→ * Only available to the listing author when the group is full\n    11→ * and no Telegram link has been set yet.\n    12→ */\n    13→export async function GET(\n    14→  _req: NextRequest,\n    15→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n    16→) {\n    17→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    18→  if (!session) {\n    19→    return NextResponse.json(\n    20→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    21→      { status: 401 }\n    22→    );\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json(\n    27→      { error: \"Telegram bot not configured\", botConfigured: false },\n    28→      { status: 404 }\n    29→    );\n    30→  }\n    31→\n    32→  const { id } = await params;\n    33→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    34→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    35→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    36→  }\n    37→\n    38→  const listing = db\n    39→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    40→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    41→\n    42→  if (!listing) {\n    43→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    44→  }\n    45→\n    46→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    47→    return NextResponse.json(\n    48→      { error: \"Only the organizer can create the Telegram group\" },\n    49→      { status: 403 }\n    50→    );\n    51→  }\n    52→\n    53→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    54→    return NextResponse.json(\n    55→      { error: \"Group must be full before creating a Telegram group\" },\n    56→      { status: 400 }\n    57→    );\n    58→  }\n    59→\n    60→  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n    61→    return NextResponse.json(\n    62→      { error: \"Telegram link already set\", telegramLink: listing.telegram_link },\n    63→      { status: 400 }\n    64→    );\n    65→  }\n    66→\n    67→  const deepLink = await generateGroupDeepLink(listingId);\n    68→  if (!deepLink) {\n    69→    return NextResponse.json(\n    70→      { error: \"Failed to generate deep link. Check bot configuration.\" },\n    71→      { status: 500 }\n    72→    );\n    73→  }\n    74→\n    75→  return NextResponse.json({\n    76→    deepLink,\n    77→    instructions:\n    78→      \"Click the link to open Telegram and create a group. The bot will automatically generate an invite link for your reading group.\",\n    79→  });\n    80→}\n    81→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_011RmKHxCBNQZ9vfdN7DDnQq","session_id":"e0175717-b3d2-4a20-ae78-d8dc36390c5a","uuid":"7e1e7c75-8315-4bc7-aed2-0c2029c0009b","timestamp":"2026-03-23T23:02:06.805Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_0189VH7NszbvXn1YAxUPi9qU","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from \"react\";\n     4→import Image from \"next/image\";\n     5→\n     6→interface BookResult {\n     7→  key: string;\n     8→  title: string;\n     9→  author_name?: string[];\n    10→  cover_i?: number;\n    11→}\n    12→\n    13→interface Props {\n    14→  onSelect: (book: {\n    15→    title: string;\n    16→    author: string;\n    17→    coverUrl: string;\n    18→    olid: string;\n    19→  }) => void;\n    20→}\n    21→\n    22→export default function BookSearch({ onSelect }: Props) {\n    23→  const [query, setQuery] = useState(\"\");\n    24→  const [results, setResults] = useState<BookResult[]>([]);\n    25→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n    26→  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);\n    27→  const [activeIndex, setActiveIndex] = useState(-1);\n    28→  const timeoutRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n    29→  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n    30→  const listboxRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n    31→\n    32→  useEffect(() => {\n    33→    const handler = (e: MouseEvent) => {\n    34→      if (\n    35→        containerRef.current &&\n    36→        !containerRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)\n    37→      ) {\n    38→        setOpen(false);\n    39→      }\n    40→    };\n    41→    document.addEventListener(\"mousedown\", handler);\n    42→    return () => document.removeEventListener(\"mousedown\", handler);\n    43→  }, []);\n    44→\n    45→  useEffect(() => {\n    46→    if (query.length < 3) {\n    47→      setResults([]);\n    48→      return;\n    49→    }\n    50→\n    51→    if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n    52→\n    53→    timeoutRef.current = setTimeout(async () => {\n    54→      setLoading(true);\n    55→      try {\n    56→        const res = await fetch(\n    57→          `https://openlibrary.org/search.json?q=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&limit=8&fields=key,title,author_name,cover_i`\n    58→        );\n    59→        const data = await res.json();\n    60→        setResults(data.docs || []);\n    61→        setOpen(true);\n    62→        setActiveIndex(-1);\n    63→      } catch {\n    64→        setResults([]);\n    65→      } finally {\n    66→        setLoading(false);\n    67→      }\n    68→    }, 400);\n    69→\n    70→    return () => {\n    71→      if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n    72→    };\n    73→  }, [query]);\n    74→\n    75→  const handleSelect = (book: BookResult) => {\n    76→    const olid = book.key.replace(\"/works/\", \"\");\n    77→    onSelect({\n    78→      title: book.title,\n    79→      author: book.author_name?.[0] || \"Unknown author\",\n    80→      coverUrl: book.cover_i\n    81→        ? `https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/${book.cover_i}-M.jpg`\n    82→        : \"\",\n    83→      olid,\n    84→    });\n    85→    setQuery(book.title);\n    86→    setOpen(false);\n    87→    setActiveIndex(-1);\n    88→  };\n    89→\n    90→  const handleKeyDown = (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {\n    91→    if (!open || results.length === 0) return;\n    92→\n    93→    switch (e.key) {\n    94→      case \"ArrowDown\":\n    95→        e.preventDefault();\n    96→        setActiveIndex((prev) => (prev < results.length - 1 ? prev + 1 : 0));\n    97→        break;\n    98→      case \"ArrowUp\":\n    99→        e.preventDefault();\n   100→        setActiveIndex((prev) => (prev > 0 ? prev - 1 : results.length - 1));\n   101→        break;\n   102→      case \"Enter\":\n   103→        e.preventDefault();\n   104→        if (activeIndex >= 0 && activeIndex < results.length) {\n   105→          handleSelect(results[activeIndex]);\n   106→        }\n   107→        break;\n   108→      case \"Escape\":\n   109→        setOpen(false);\n   110→        setActiveIndex(-1);\n   111→        break;\n   112→    }\n   113→  };\n   114→\n   115→  // Scroll active option into view\n   116→  useEffect(() => {\n   117→    if (activeIndex >= 0 && listboxRef.current) {\n   118→      const activeEl = listboxRef.current.children[activeIndex] as HTMLElement;\n   119→      if (activeEl) {\n   120→        activeEl.scrollIntoView({ block: \"nearest\" });\n   121→      }\n   122→    }\n   123→  }, [activeIndex]);\n   124→\n   125→  const activeDescendant =\n   126→    activeIndex >= 0 && results[activeIndex]\n   127→      ? `book-option-${results[activeIndex].key}`\n   128→      : undefined;\n   129→\n   130→  return (\n   131→    <div ref={containerRef} className=\"relative\">\n   132→      <input\n   133→        type=\"text\"\n   134→        className=\"input-field\"\n   135→        value={query}\n   136→        onChange={(e) => setQuery(e.target.value)}\n   137→        onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}\n   138→        placeholder=\"Search for a book title...\"\n   139→        onFocus={() => results.length > 0 && setOpen(true)}\n   140→        role=\"combobox\"\n   141→        aria-expanded={open && results.length > 0}\n   142→        aria-haspopup=\"listbox\"\n   143→        aria-controls=\"book-search-listbox\"\n   144→        aria-activedescendant={activeDescendant}\n   145→        aria-label=\"Search for a book\"\n   146→        aria-autocomplete=\"list\"\n   147→      />\n   148→      {loading && (\n   149→        <div\n   150→          className=\"absolute right-3 top-3 text-xs\"\n   151→          style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   152→          role=\"status\"\n   153→          aria-live=\"polite\"\n   154→        >\n   155→          Searching...\n   156→        </div>\n   157→      )}\n   158→\n   159→      {open && results.length > 0 && (\n   160→        <div\n   161→          ref={listboxRef}\n   162→          id=\"book-search-listbox\"\n   163→          role=\"listbox\"\n   164→          aria-label=\"Book search results\"\n   165→          className=\"absolute z-10 w-full mt-1 card shadow-lg max-h-72 overflow-y-auto\"\n   166→          style={{ padding: \"0.5rem 0\" }}\n   167→        >\n   168→          {results.map((book, index) => (\n   169→            <button\n   170→              key={book.key}\n   171→              id={`book-option-${book.key}`}\n   172→              type=\"button\"\n   173→              role=\"option\"\n   174→              aria-selected={index === activeIndex}\n   175→              onClick={() => handleSelect(book)}\n   176→              className=\"w-full text-left px-4 py-2 hover:bg-gray-50 flex items-center gap-3 cursor-pointer\"\n   177→              style={{\n   178→                backgroundColor: index === activeIndex ? \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04)\" : undefined,\n   179→              }}\n   180→            >\n   181→              {book.cover_i ? (\n   182→                <Image\n   183→                  src={`https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/${book.cover_i}-S.jpg`}\n   184→                  alt={`Cover of ${book.title}`}\n   185→                  width={32}\n   186→                  height={48}\n   187→                  className=\"w-8 h-12 object-cover rounded\"\n   188→                />\n   189→              ) : (\n   190→                <div\n   191→                  className=\"w-8 h-12 rounded flex items-center justify-center text-sm\"\n   192→                  style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-border)\" }}\n   193→                  aria-hidden=\"true\"\n   194→                >\n   195→                  <span role=\"img\" aria-hidden=\"true\">📖</span>\n   196→                </div>\n   197→              )}\n   198→              <div className=\"min-w-0\">\n   199→                <div\n   200→                  className=\"text-sm font-semibold truncate\"\n   201→                  style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   202→                >\n   203→                  {book.title}\n   204→                </div>\n   205→                <div\n   206→                  className=\"text-xs truncate\"\n   207→                  style={{\n   208→                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   209→                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   210→                  }}\n   211→                >\n   212→                  {book.author_name?.[0] || \"Unknown author\"}\n   213→                </div>\n   214→              </div>\n   215→            </button>\n   216→          ))}\n   217→        </div>\n   218→      )}\n   219→    </div>\n   220→  );\n   221→}\n   222→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_011RmKHxCBNQZ9vfdN7DDnQq","session_id":"e0175717-b3d2-4a20-ae78-d8dc36390c5a","uuid":"4fa0a749-ea87-4444-a2e4-46c325238104","timestamp":"2026-03-23T23:02:10.058Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01X7hCT25hygnU9gXbdwnPa2","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import nodemailer from \"nodemailer\";\n     2→\n     3→const isConfigured =\n     4→  !!process.env.SMTP_HOST &&\n     5→  !!process.env.SMTP_PORT &&\n     6→  !!process.env.SMTP_FROM;\n     7→\n     8→let transporter: nodemailer.Transporter | null = null;\n     9→\n    10→function getTransporter(): nodemailer.Transporter | null {\n    11→  if (!isConfigured) return null;\n    12→  if (!transporter) {\n    13→    transporter = nodemailer.createTransport({\n    14→      host: process.env.SMTP_HOST,\n    15→      port: parseInt(process.env.SMTP_PORT || \"587\", 10),\n    16→      secure: process.env.SMTP_SECURE === \"true\",\n    17→      ...(process.env.SMTP_USER && process.env.SMTP_PASS\n    18→        ? {\n    19→            auth: {\n    20→              user: process.env.SMTP_USER,\n    21→              pass: process.env.SMTP_PASS,\n    22→            },\n    23→          }\n    24→        : {}),\n    25→    });\n    26→  }\n    27→  return transporter;\n    28→}\n    29→\n    30→export async function sendEmail(\n    31→  to: string,\n    32→  subject: string,\n    33→  text: string,\n    34→  html?: string\n    35→): Promise<boolean> {\n    36→  const t = getTransporter();\n    37→  if (!t) return false;\n    38→\n    39→  try {\n    40→    await t.sendMail({\n    41→      from: process.env.SMTP_FROM,\n    42→      to,\n    43→      subject,\n    44→      text,\n    45→      html: html || text,\n    46→    });\n    47→    return true;\n    48→  } catch (err) {\n    49→    console.error(\"Failed to send email:\", err);\n    50→    return false;\n    51→  }\n    52→}\n    53→\n    54→export function isEmailConfigured(): boolean {\n    55→  return isConfigured;\n    56→}\n    57→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_011RmKHxCBNQZ9vfdN7DDnQq","session_id":"e0175717-b3d2-4a20-ae78-d8dc36390c5a","uuid":"a58587ee-2d7f-42c6-b52f-05bdda3ee9ec","timestamp":"2026-03-23T23:02:10.758Z"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Ry1R7mumowBhu92GDqX6Rn","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import Link from \"next/link\";\n     4→import { useEffect, useState, useRef } from \"react\";\n     5→import { useRouter, usePathname } from \"next/navigation\";\n     6→\n     7→interface User {\n     8→  id: number;\n     9→  email: string;\n    10→  displayName: string;\n    11→}\n    12→\n    13→export default function Navbar() {\n    14→  const [user, setUser] = useState<User | null>(null);\n    15→  const [notifCount, setNotifCount] = useState(0);\n    16→  const [menuOpen, setMenuOpen] = useState(false);\n    17→  const [mobileMenuOpen, setMobileMenuOpen] = useState(false);\n    18→  const router = useRouter();\n    19→  const pathname = usePathname();\n    20→  const menuRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n    21→\n    22→  useEffect(() => {\n    23→    fetch(\"/api/auth/me\")\n    24→      .then((r) => r.json())\n    25→      .then((data) => {\n    26→        if (data.user) {\n    27→          setUser(data.user);\n    28→          setNotifCount(data.user.unreadNotificationCount || 0);\n    29→        }\n    30→      })\n    31→      .catch(() => {\n    32→        // Auth check failed — stay logged out\n    33→      });\n    34→  }, []);\n    35→\n    36→  // Close menus on outside click\n    37→  useEffect(() => {\n    38→    const handleClickOutside = (e: MouseEvent) => {\n    39→      if (menuRef.current && !menuRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)) {\n    40→        setMenuOpen(false);\n    41→      }\n    42→    };\n    43→    document.addEventListener(\"mousedown\", handleClickOutside);\n    44→    return () => document.removeEventListener(\"mousedown\", handleClickOutside);\n    45→  }, []);\n    46→\n    47→  // Close mobile menu on route change\n    48→  useEffect(() => {\n    49→    setMobileMenuOpen(false);\n    50→    setMenuOpen(false);\n    51→  }, [pathname]);\n    52→\n    53→  const handleLogout = async () => {\n    54→    await fetch(\"/api/auth/logout\", { method: \"POST\" });\n    55→    setUser(null);\n    56→    setMenuOpen(false);\n    57→    setMobileMenuOpen(false);\n    58→    router.push(\"/\");\n    59→    router.refresh();\n    60→  };\n    61→\n    62→  return (\n    63→    <nav\n    64→      className=\"border-b sticky top-0 z-50\"\n    65→      style={{\n    66→        borderColor: \"var(--color-border)\",\n    67→        backgroundColor: \"var(--color-bg)\",\n    68→      }}\n    69→    >\n    70→      <div className=\"max-w-5xl mx-auto px-3 sm:px-4 h-14 sm:h-16 flex items-center justify-between\">\n    71→        <Link\n    72→          href=\"/\"\n    73→          className=\"text-lg sm:text-xl font-bold\"\n    74→          style={{ color: \"var(--color-accent)\", letterSpacing: \"-0.03em\" }}\n    75→          onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(false)}\n    76→        >\n    77→          bookmate\n    78→        </Link>\n    79→\n    80→        {/* Desktop nav */}\n    81→        <div className=\"hidden sm:flex items-center gap-4\">\n    82→          {user ? (\n    83→            <>\n    84→              <Link\n    85→                href=\"/listings/create\"\n    86→                className=\"btn-primary text-sm\"\n    87→                style={{ padding: \"0.5rem 1rem\" }}\n    88→              >\n    89→                + New Listing\n    90→              </Link>\n    91→\n    92→              <div className=\"relative\" ref={menuRef}>\n    93→                <button\n    94→                  onClick={() => setMenuOpen(!menuOpen)}\n    95→                  className=\"flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer\"\n    96→                  style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif\" }}\n    97→                  aria-label={`User menu for ${user.displayName}${notifCount > 0 ? `, ${notifCount} unread notifications` : \"\"}`}\n    98→                  aria-expanded={menuOpen}\n    99→                  aria-haspopup=\"true\"\n   100→                >\n   101→                  <div\n   102→                    className=\"w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold text-white\"\n   103→                    style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\" }}\n   104→                  >\n   105→                    {user.displayName.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}\n   106→                  </div>\n   107→                  {notifCount > 0 && (\n   108→                    <span\n   109→ {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_012J25FXn4sbQRuS1AN4h7Bm","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01Qeya3B2cD9rjyBVAep6Ygn","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/profile/genres/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":621,"cache_creation_input_tokens":7065,"cache_read_input_tokens":48342,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":7065,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_011RmKHxCBNQZ9vfdN7DDnQq","session_id":"e0175717-b3d2-4a20-ae78-d8dc36390c5a","uuid":"bac4526f-ecac-481b-a20e-4c2b2b0c9430"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Qeya3B2cD9rjyBVAep6Ygn","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→const AVAILABLE_GENRES = [\n     6→  \"Literary Fiction\",\n     7→  \"Science Fiction\",\n     8→  \"Fantasy\",\n     9→  \"Mystery\",\n    10→  \"Thriller\",\n    11→  \"Romance\",\n    12→  \"Historical Fiction\",\n    13→  \"Horror\",\n    14→  \"Dystopian\",\n    15→  \"Adventure\",\n    16→  \"Contemporary Fiction\",\n    17→  \"Magical Realism\",\n    18→  \"Classics\",\n    19→  \"Short Stories\",\n    20→  \"Young Adult\",\n    21→  \"Graphic Novels\",\n    22→];\n    23→\n    24→interface GenreRow {\n    25→  genre: string;\n    26→}\n    27→\n    28→export async function GET() {\n    29→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    30→  if (!session) {\n    31→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    32→  }\n    33→\n    34→  const userGenres = db.prepare(\n    35→    \"SELECT genre FROM user_genres WHERE user_id = ? ORDER BY genre\"\n    36→  ).all(session.userId) as GenreRow[];\n    37→\n    38→  return NextResponse.json({\n    39→    genres: userGenres.map((g) => g.genre),\n    40→    available: AVAILABLE_GENRES,\n    41→  });\n    42→}\n    43→\n    44→export async function PUT(req: NextRequest) {\n    45→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    46→  if (!session) {\n    47→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    48→  }\n    49→\n    50→  const { genres } = await req.json();\n    51→\n    52→  if (!Array.isArray(genres)) {\n    53→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"genres must be an array\" }, { status: 400 });\n    54→  }\n    55→\n    56→  // Validate all genres\n    57→  const validGenres = genres.filter((g: string) => AVAILABLE_GENRES.includes(g));\n    58→\n    59→  // Replace all genres in a transaction\n    60→  const updateGenres = db.transaction(() => {\n    61→    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM user_genres WHERE user_id = ?\").run(session.userId);\n    62→    const insert = db.prepare(\"INSERT INTO user_genres (user_id, genre) VALUES (?, ?)\");\n    63→    for (const genre of validGenres) {\n    64→      insert.run(session.userId, genre);\n    65→    }\n    66→  });\n    67→\n    68→  updateGenres();\n    69→\n    70→  return NextResponse.json({ genres: validGenres });\n    71→}\n    72→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_011RmKHxCBNQZ9vfdN7DDnQq","session_id":"e0175717-b3d2-4a20-ae78-d8dc36390c5a","uuid":"02fb9a33-b925-4820-adf9-76c054b2575d","timestamp":"2026-03-23T23:02:14.242Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_012J25FXn4sbQRuS1AN4h7Bm","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01Tu2J5dmpQ5YdDwHGA1gMBh","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/profile/reading/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":621,"cache_creation_input_tokens":7065,"cache_read_input_tokens":48342,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":7065,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_011RmKHxCBNQZ9vfdN7DDnQq","session_id":"e0175717-b3d2-4a20-ae78-d8dc36390c5a","uuid":"c0556055-4328-45dc-8e95-ce0c4abcd9e6"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Tu2J5dmpQ5YdDwHGA1gMBh","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→interface ReadingRow {\n     6→  id: number;\n     7→  book_title: string;\n     8→  book_author: string;\n     9→  book_cover_url: string;\n    10→  reading_pace: string;\n    11→  start_date: string;\n    12→  meeting_format: string;\n    13→  is_full: number;\n    14→  telegram_link: string;\n    15→  member_count: number;\n    16→  max_group_size: number;\n    17→  author_name: string;\n    18→  joined_at: string;\n    19→}\n    20→\n    21→export async function GET() {\n    22→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    23→  if (!session) {\n    24→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    25→  }\n    26→\n    27→  // Get all listings the user is a member of (including ones they authored)\n    28→  const readings = db.prepare(`\n    29→    SELECT\n    30→      l.id,\n    31→      l.book_title,\n    32→      l.book_author,\n    33→      l.book_cover_url,\n    34→      l.reading_pace,\n    35→      l.start_date,\n    36→      l.meeting_format,\n    37→      l.is_full,\n    38→      l.telegram_link,\n    39→      l.max_group_size,\n    40→      u.display_name as author_name,\n    41→      lm.joined_at,\n    42→      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = l.id) as member_count\n    43→    FROM listing_members lm\n    44→    JOIN listings l ON l.id = lm.listing_id\n    45→    JOIN users u ON u.id = l.author_id\n    46→    WHERE lm.user_id = ?\n    47→    ORDER BY lm.joined_at DESC\n    48→  `).all(session.userId) as ReadingRow[];\n    49→\n    50→  const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n    51→\n    52→  // Reading history: completed groups (full + start_date in the past)\n    53→  // Upcoming: not yet started and not full\n    54→  // Active: everything else that has started or is full (but not completed)\n    55→  const isHistory = (r: ReadingRow) => r.is_full === 1 && r.start_date < today;\n    56→  const isUpcoming = (r: ReadingRow) => r.is_full === 0 && r.start_date > today;\n    57→\n    58→  const history = readings.filter(isHistory);\n    59→  const upcoming = readings.filter(isUpcoming);\n    60→  const active = readings.filter(\n    61→    (r) => !isHistory(r) && !isUpcoming(r) && (r.is_full === 1 || r.start_date <= today)\n    62→  );\n    63→\n    64→  return NextResponse.json({\n    65→    active,\n    66→    history,\n    67→    upcoming,\n    68→    total: readings.length,\n    69→  });\n    70→}\n    71→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_011RmKHxCBNQZ9vfdN7DDnQq","session_id":"e0175717-b3d2-4a20-ae78-d8dc36390c5a","uuid":"adc39274-ea0a-4d79-9101-567c5542b467","timestamp":"2026-03-23T23:02:14.656Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01SoA56wUKzh4aUyNeGnRCSi","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import { isBotConfigured, setWebhook, getBotInfo } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     3→\n     4→/**\n     5→ * POST /api/telegram/setup\n     6→ *\n     7→ * Sets up the Telegram webhook. Should be called once after deployment.\n     8→ * Requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL env vars.\n     9→ *\n    10→ * Protected by a setup secret to prevent unauthorized access.\n    11→ */\n    12→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    13→  const setupSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET;\n    14→  if (!setupSecret) {\n    15→    return NextResponse.json(\n    16→      { error: \"TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET not configured\" },\n    17→      { status: 500 }\n    18→    );\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  const body = await req.json();\n    22→  if (body.secret !== setupSecret) {\n    23→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    24→  }\n    25→\n    26→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    27→    return NextResponse.json(\n    28→      { error: \"TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN not configured\" },\n    29→      { status: 500 }\n    30→    );\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  const webhookUrl = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL;\n    34→  if (!webhookUrl) {\n    35→    return NextResponse.json(\n    36→      { error: \"TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL not configured\" },\n    37→      { status: 500 }\n    38→    );\n    39→  }\n    40→\n    41→  const bot = await getBotInfo();\n    42→  if (!bot) {\n    43→    return NextResponse.json(\n    44→      { error: \"Failed to connect to Telegram API. Check your bot token.\" },\n    45→      { status: 500 }\n    46→    );\n    47→  }\n    48→\n    49→  const success = await setWebhook(webhookUrl);\n    50→  if (!success) {\n    51→    return NextResponse.json(\n    52→      { error: \"Failed to set webhook\" },\n    53→      { status: 500 }\n    54→    );\n    55→  }\n    56→\n    57→  return NextResponse.json({\n    58→    ok: true,\n    59→    bot: { username: bot.username, id: bot.id },\n    60→    webhookUrl,\n    61→  });\n    62→}\n    63→\n    64→/**\n    65→ * GET /api/telegram/setup\n    66→ *\n    67→ * Returns the current Telegram bot configuration status.\n    68→ */\n    69→export async function GET() {\n    70→  return NextResponse.json({\n    71→    botConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n    72→    webhookUrlConfigured: !!process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL,\n    73→  });\n    74→}\n    75→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_011RmKHxCBNQZ9vfdN7DDnQq","session_id":"e0175717-b3d2-4a20-ae78-d8dc36390c5a","uuid":"b6f143c4-a025-4c4f-a734-e038e5796187","timestamp":"2026-03-23T23:02:14.772Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01YPsVbtbYWzGtoP5gLAMcWU","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import { isBotConfigured, getBotInfo } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     3→\n     4→/**\n     5→ * Discord bot setup endpoint.\n     6→ * Returns bot info and invite URL for verification.\n     7→ *\n     8→ * Protected by DISCORD_SETUP_SECRET env var.\n     9→ */\n    10→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    11→  const { secret } = await req.json();\n    12→  const setupSecret = process.env.DISCORD_SETUP_SECRET || \"\";\n    13→\n    14→  if (!setupSecret || secret !== setupSecret) {\n    15→    return NextResponse.json(\n    16→      { error: \"Invalid setup secret\" },\n    17→      { status: 403 }\n    18→    );\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    22→    return NextResponse.json(\n    23→      {\n    24→        error:\n    25→          \"Discord bot is not configured. Set DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN and DISCORD_CLIENT_ID environment variables.\",\n    26→      },\n    27→      { status: 503 }\n    28→    );\n    29→  }\n    30→\n    31→  const botInfo = await getBotInfo();\n    32→  if (!botInfo) {\n    33→    return NextResponse.json(\n    34→      { error: \"Failed to connect to Discord API. Check your bot token.\" },\n    35→      { status: 500 }\n    36→    );\n    37→  }\n    38→\n    39→  return NextResponse.json({\n    40→    ok: true,\n    41→    bot: {\n    42→      id: botInfo.id,\n    43→      username: botInfo.username,\n    44→    },\n    45→    message: `Discord bot \"${botInfo.username}\" is configured and ready.`,\n    46→  });\n    47→}\n    48→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_011RmKHxCBNQZ9vfdN7DDnQq","session_id":"e0175717-b3d2-4a20-ae78-d8dc36390c5a","uuid":"c24a7fde-d721-415d-9993-698cd7b58b56","timestamp":"2026-03-23T23:02:17.652Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01LjtXLawZWF2J1o1p7RGFrS","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     3→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function GET() {\n     6→  const session = await getSession();\n     7→\n     8→  if (!session.userId) {\n     9→    return NextResponse.json({ user: null });\n    10→  }\n    11→\n    12→  const user = db\n    13→    .prepare(\"SELECT id, email, display_name, bio FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n    14→    .get(session.userId) as\n    15→    | { id: number; email: string; display_name: string; bio: string }\n    16→    | undefined;\n    17→\n    18→  if (!user) {\n    19→    session.destroy();\n    20→    return NextResponse.json({ user: null });\n    21→  }\n    22→\n    23→  // Include unread notification count to avoid a second round-trip from the Navbar\n    24→  const unread = db\n    25→    .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM notifications WHERE user_id = ? AND is_read = 0\")\n    26→    .get(session.userId) as { count: number };\n    27→\n    28→  return NextResponse.json({\n    29→    user: {\n    30→      id: user.id,\n    31→      email: user.email,\n    32→      displayName: user.display_name,\n    33→      bio: user.bio,\n    34→      unreadNotificationCount: unread.count,\n    35→    },\n    36→  });\n    37→}\n    38→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_011RmKHxCBNQZ9vfdN7DDnQq","session_id":"e0175717-b3d2-4a20-ae78-d8dc36390c5a","uuid":"43923c9a-45f9-464a-b9ff-a86fa748f686","timestamp":"2026-03-23T23:02:20.373Z"}

Please try again.\");\n   253→    } finally {\n   254→      setDecidingId(null);\n   255→    }\n   256→  };\n   257→\n   258→  const isValidTelegramLink = (link: string) => {\n   259→    return /^https:\\/\\/t\\.me\\/[\\w+/]+$/.test(link.trim());\n   260→  };\n   261→\n   262→  const telegramLinkError = telegramLink && !isValidTelegramLink(telegramLink)\n   263→    ? \"Link must start with https://t.me/ (e.g., https://t.me/+AbCdEfGhIjK)\"\n   264→    : \"\";\n   265→\n   266→  const handleTelegramSave = async () => {\n   267→    if (!isValidTelegramLink(telegramLink)) return;\n   268→    setTelegramSaving(true);\n   269→    setError(\"\");\n   270→    try {\n   271→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/telegram`, {\n   272→        method: \"POST\",\n   273→        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n   274→        body: JSON.stringify({ telegramLink: telegramLink.trim() }),\n   275→      });\n   276→      const data = await res.json();\n   277→      if (!res.ok) {\n   278→        setError(data.error);\n   279→        return;\n   280→      }\n   281→      await fetchListing();\n   282→    } catch {\n   283→      setError(\"Failed to save link. Please try again.\");\n   284→    } finally {\n   285→      setTelegramSaving(false);\n   286→    }\n   287→  };\n   288→\n   289→  const handleAutoTelegram = async () => {\n   290→    setAutoTelegramLoading(true);\n   291→    setError(\"\");\n   292→    try {\n   293→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/auto-telegram`);\n   294→      const data = await res.json();\n   295→      if (!res.ok) {\n   296→        setError(data.error || \"Failed to generate Telegram link\");\n   297→        return;\n   298→      }\n   299→      setAutoTelegramLink(data.deepLink);"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_011RmKHxCBNQZ9vfdN7DDnQq","session_id":"e0175717-b3d2-4a20-ae78-d8dc36390c5a","uuid":"c950e3d8-2f66-4364-8a95-d646505c609d","timestamp":"2026-03-23T23:02:26.432Z"}

{"type":"system","subtype":"task_notification","task_id":"a75f74417048dd7af","tool_use_id":"toolu_011RmKHxCBNQZ9vfdN7DDnQq","status":"completed","output_file":"","summary":"Review codebase for improvements","usage":{"total_tokens":69349,"tool_uses":47,"duration_ms":107426},"uuid":"f34ff14d-4562-4fb3-afe6-5221e5db2697","session_id":"e0175717-b3d2-4a20-ae78-d8dc36390c5a"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_011RmKHxCBNQZ9vfdN7DDnQq","type":"tool_result","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Now I have a comprehensive picture of the codebase. Let me compile the findings.\n\n---\n\n## Code Review: Bookmate Next.js Application\n\nReviewing the full API surface in `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/`, `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/`, and `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/components/`.\n\n---\n\n## Critical Issues\n\n### 1. `session.destroy()` is not awaited — session cookie is never cleared on logout\n\n**Confidence: 100**\n\n**File:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/auth/logout/route.ts` (line 6) and `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/auth/me/route.ts` (line 19)\n\n`iron-session`'s `destroy()` method is async — it must be awaited to actually clear the cookie from the response. Without `await`, the `Set-Cookie` header is never written, so the session cookie persists in the browser. Every logout attempt silently fails.\n\n```ts\n// Current (broken):\nsession.destroy();\nreturn NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n\n// Fix:\nawait session.destroy();\nreturn NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n```\n\nThe same issue exists in `me/route.ts` line 19 where a deleted user's stale session is cleaned up. The cookie will not be invalidated and the next request will hit the same dead-session branch again infinitely (until the cookie expires naturally after 7 days).\n\n---\n\n### 2. `maxGroupSize` PATCH does not re-check against `is_full` — group can get stuck permanently full\n\n**Confidence: 85**\n\n**File:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts` (lines 179–244)\n\nWhen an author increases `maxGroupSize` on a listing that was previously auto-closed (`is_full = 1`), the `is_full` flag is never reset to `0`. The listing remains invisible in search results (`l.is_full = 0` filter in the listings route), no one can join or apply, and it is forever stuck in a full state even though there are now open slots.\n\nThe `is_full` guard at line 141 blocks edits once a platform link is shared, but `is_full` can be `1` without a platform link — for example, a listing with `requires_approval` that was filled and later had its max size raised before a Telegram/Discord link was set.\n\nFix: inside the `maxGroupSize` update branch, if `size > memberCount`, also set `is_full = 0` in the UPDATE statement.\n\n---\n\n## Important Issues\n\n### 3. `notifyGroupFull` is called with stale `listing.author_id` from the pre-transaction snapshot\n\n**Confidence: 85**\n\n**File:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/join/route.ts` (lines 92–103)\n\nThe `listing` object is fetched before the transaction at line 21. The `notifyGroupFull` function at line 102 is called outside the transaction using the in-scope `listing.max_group_size`, but `result.count` is compared against it. This is fine for the count, but inside `notifyGroupFull` in `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/notifications.ts` (lines 113–140), the function queries `listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?` to find members to notify.\n\nThe exclusion of the author uses `listing?.author_id ?? -1` fetched fresh from the DB inside `notifyGroupFull`. That is safe. However, `notifyGroupFull` checks `process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN` and `process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN` to decide the notification message, but the notification type string it emits (`\"group_full\"`) is not in the `getEmailSubject` switch in `notifications.ts`. This means the group-full email subject falls through to the generic `\"Bookmate: Notification\"` default rather than a meaningful subject. This is a silent usability degradation for every group-full email.\n\n**File:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/notifications.ts` (lines 31–52)\n\nThe `getEmailSubject` switch is missing cases for `\"group_full\"`, `\"telegram_ready\"`, and `\"discord_ready\"` — all three notification types that are emitted by the application. All three fall through to the `\"Bookmate: Notification\"` default.\n\nFix: add the missing cases:\n```ts\ncase \"group_full\":\n  return \"Bookmate: Your reading group is full!\";\ncase \"telegram_ready\":\n  return \"Bookmate: Your Telegram reading group is ready!\";\ncase \"discord_ready\":\n  return \"Bookmate: Your Discord channel is ready!\";\n```\n\n---\n\n### 4. Discord webhook `handleLink` does not validate that `listingId` is a positive integer\n\n**Confidence: 85**\n\n**File:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/webhook/route.ts` (lines 56–90)\n\nThe `handleLink` function accepts `listingId: number` from the POST body but only checks `if (!guildId || !listingId)`. It does not verify that `listingId` is a valid positive integer — a non-integer number or a negative value would pass the truthiness check and be passed directly to `db.prepare(...).get(listingId)`. This is authenticated only by the `DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET` header, but the lack of input validation is inconsistent with the rest of the codebase (every other route does `parseInt` + `isNaN` + range checks) and could produce confusing DB errors rather than a clean 400.\n\nFix: add `typeof listingId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(listingId) || listingId < 1` check, mirroring the pattern used in `/api/listings/[id]/applications/route.ts` line 36.\n\n---\n\n### 5. `BookSearch` component does not cancel in-flight fetch requests on unmount or rapid query changes\n\n**Confidence: 80**\n\n**File:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/components/BookSearch.tsx` (lines 53–68)\n\nThe debounced `setTimeout` is cleared correctly, but the `fetch()` call itself is not aborted. If the component unmounts while a request is in-flight (user navigates away mid-search), `setResults`, `setOpen`, and `setLoading` will be called on an unmounted component. React 18 silences the warning but the state updates are still wasted work, and in edge cases where the component is remounted quickly, a stale response from a prior query could land after a newer one, reversing the results (a classic race condition).\n\nFix: use `AbortController` inside the debounce callback:\n\n```ts\nconst controller = new AbortController();\ntimeoutRef.current = setTimeout(async () => {\n  setLoading(true);\n  try {\n    const res = await fetch(`...`, { signal: controller.signal });\n    // ...\n  } catch (err) {\n    if ((err as Error).name !== \"AbortError\") setResults([]);\n  } finally {\n    setLoading(false);\n  }\n}, 400);\n\nreturn () => {\n  if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n  controller.abort();\n};\n```\n\n---\n\n## Summary\n\n| # | Severity | Issue | File |\n|---|----------|-------|------|\n| 1 | Critical | `session.destroy()` not awaited — logout never clears the cookie | `/app/api/auth/logout/route.ts:6`, `/app/api/auth/me/route.ts:19` |\n| 2 | Critical | Increasing `maxGroupSize` via PATCH never resets `is_full = 0` | `/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts:226–228` |\n| 3 | Important | Missing email subject cases for `group_full`, `telegram_ready`, `discord_ready` | `/lib/notifications.ts:31–52` |\n| 4 | Important | Discord webhook `handleLink` skips integer validation on `listingId` | `/app/api/discord/webhook/route.ts:63` |\n| 5 | Important | `BookSearch` fetch not aborted on unmount — stale response race condition | `/components/BookSearch.tsx:53–68` |\n\nIssue #1 is the most impactful in production: every user who clicks \"Sign out\" remains logged in until their 7-day session cookie expires naturally."},{"type":"text","text":"agentId: a75f74417048dd7af (use SendMessage with to: 'a75f74417048dd7af' to continue this agent)\n<usage>total_tokens: 69716\ntool_uses: 47\nduration_ms: 107428</usage>"}]}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"e0175717-b3d2-4a20-ae78-d8dc36390c5a","uuid":"eee9c229-ff64-4fa4-a784-59d092862a10","timestamp":"2026-03-23T23:03:22.955Z","tool_use_result":{"status":"completed","prompt":"Review the Bookmate Next.js application in /root/Projects/bookmate/app for any remaining code quality issues, bugs, or improvements. Focus on:\n\n1. The main API routes in app/app/api/ - look for any unhandled edge cases, missing validation, or error handling gaps\n2. The lib/ directory - database queries, session handling, notifications\n3. Client-side components in app/components/ and pages\n\nThis is a mature project with 197 tests and all features implemented. Look for subtle issues that might have been missed - things like:\n- Race conditions\n- Memory leaks  \n- Missing error handling\n- Inconsistent behavior\n- Performance issues (N+1 queries, unnecessary re-renders)\n- Data integrity issues\n\nOnly report HIGH confidence issues that genuinely matter. Skip style/formatting issues.","agentId":"a75f74417048dd7af","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Now I have a comprehensive picture of the codebase. Let me compile the findings.\n\n---\n\n## Code Review: Bookmate Next.js Application\n\nReviewing the full API surface in `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/`, `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/`, and `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/components/`.\n\n---\n\n## Critical Issues\n\n### 1. `session.destroy()` is not awaited — session cookie is never cleared on logout\n\n**Confidence: 100**\n\n**File:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/auth/logout/route.ts` (line 6) and `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/auth/me/route.ts` (line 19)\n\n`iron-session`'s `destroy()` method is async — it must be awaited to actually clear the cookie from the response. Without `await`, the `Set-Cookie` header is never written, so the session cookie persists in the browser. Every logout attempt silently fails.\n\n```ts\n// Current (broken):\nsession.destroy();\nreturn NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n\n// Fix:\nawait session.destroy();\nreturn NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n```\n\nThe same issue exists in `me/route.ts` line 19 where a deleted user's stale session is cleaned up. The cookie will not be invalidated and the next request will hit the same dead-session branch again infinitely (until the cookie expires naturally after 7 days).\n\n---\n\n### 2. `maxGroupSize` PATCH does not re-check against `is_full` — group can get stuck permanently full\n\n**Confidence: 85**\n\n**File:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts` (lines 179–244)\n\nWhen an author increases `maxGroupSize` on a listing that was previously auto-closed (`is_full = 1`), the `is_full` flag is never reset to `0`. The listing remains invisible in search results (`l.is_full = 0` filter in the listings route), no one can join or apply, and it is forever stuck in a full state even though there are now open slots.\n\nThe `is_full` guard at line 141 blocks edits once a platform link is shared, but `is_full` can be `1` without a platform link — for example, a listing with `requires_approval` that was filled and later had its max size raised before a Telegram/Discord link was set.\n\nFix: inside the `maxGroupSize` update branch, if `size > memberCount`, also set `is_full = 0` in the UPDATE statement.\n\n---\n\n## Important Issues\n\n### 3. `notifyGroupFull` is called with stale `listing.author_id` from the pre-transaction snapshot\n\n**Confidence: 85**\n\n**File:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/join/route.ts` (lines 92–103)\n\nThe `listing` object is fetched before the transaction at line 21. The `notifyGroupFull` function at line 102 is called outside the transaction using the in-scope `listing.max_group_size`, but `result.count` is compared against it. This is fine for the count, but inside `notifyGroupFull` in `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/notifications.ts` (lines 113–140), the function queries `listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?` to find members to notify.\n\nThe exclusion of the author uses `listing?.author_id ?? -1` fetched fresh from the DB inside `notifyGroupFull`. That is safe. However, `notifyGroupFull` checks `process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN` and `process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN` to decide the notification message, but the notification type string it emits (`\"group_full\"`) is not in the `getEmailSubject` switch in `notifications.ts`. This means the group-full email subject falls through to the generic `\"Bookmate: Notification\"` default rather than a meaningful subject. This is a silent usability degradation for every group-full email.\n\n**File:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/notifications.ts` (lines 31–52)\n\nThe `getEmailSubject` switch is missing cases for `\"group_full\"`, `\"telegram_ready\"`, and `\"discord_ready\"` — all three notification types that are emitted by the application. All three fall through to the `\"Bookmate: Notification\"` default.\n\nFix: add the missing cases:\n```ts\ncase \"group_full\":\n  return \"Bookmate: Your reading group is full!\";\ncase \"telegram_ready\":\n  return \"Bookmate: Your Telegram reading group is ready!\";\ncase \"discord_ready\":\n  return \"Bookmate: Your Discord channel is ready!\";\n```\n\n---\n\n### 4. Discord webhook `handleLink` does not validate that `listingId` is a positive integer\n\n**Confidence: 85**\n\n**File:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/webhook/route.ts` (lines 56–90)\n\nThe `handleLink` function accepts `listingId: number` from the POST body but only checks `if (!guildId || !listingId)`. It does not verify that `listingId` is a valid positive integer — a non-integer number or a negative value would pass the truthiness check and be passed directly to `db.prepare(...).get(listingId)`. This is authenticated only by the `DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET` header, but the lack of input validation is inconsistent with the rest of the codebase (every other route does `parseInt` + `isNaN` + range checks) and could produce confusing DB errors rather than a clean 400.\n\nFix: add `typeof listingId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(listingId) || listingId < 1` check, mirroring the pattern used in `/api/listings/[id]/applications/route.ts` line 36.\n\n---\n\n### 5. `BookSearch` component does not cancel in-flight fetch requests on unmount or rapid query changes\n\n**Confidence: 80**\n\n**File:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/components/BookSearch.tsx` (lines 53–68)\n\nThe debounced `setTimeout` is cleared correctly, but the `fetch()` call itself is not aborted. If the component unmounts while a request is in-flight (user navigates away mid-search), `setResults`, `setOpen`, and `setLoading` will be called on an unmounted component. React 18 silences the warning but the state updates are still wasted work, and in edge cases where the component is remounted quickly, a stale response from a prior query could land after a newer one, reversing the results (a classic race condition).\n\nFix: use `AbortController` inside the debounce callback:\n\n```ts\nconst controller = new AbortController();\ntimeoutRef.current = setTimeout(async () => {\n  setLoading(true);\n  try {\n    const res = await fetch(`...`, { signal: controller.signal });\n    // ...\n  } catch (err) {\n    if ((err as Error).name !== \"AbortError\") setResults([]);\n  } finally {\n    setLoading(false);\n  }\n}, 400);\n\nreturn () => {\n  if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n  controller.abort();\n};\n```\n\n---\n\n## Summary\n\n| # | Severity | Issue | File |\n|---|----------|-------|------|\n| 1 | Critical | `session.destroy()` not awaited — logout never clears the cookie | `/app/api/auth/logout/route.ts:6`, `/app/api/auth/me/route.ts:19` |\n| 2 | Critical | Increasing `maxGroupSize` via PATCH never resets `is_full = 0` | `/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts:226–228` |\n| 3 | Important | Missing email subject cases for `group_full`, `telegram_ready`, `discord_ready` | `/lib/notifications.ts:31–52` |\n| 4 | Important | Discord webhook `handleLink` skips integer validation on `listingId` | `/app/api/discord/webhook/route.ts:63` |\n| 5 | Important | `BookSearch` fetch not aborted on unmount — stale response race condition | `/components/BookSearch.tsx:53–68` |\n\nIssue #1 is the most impactful in production: every user who clicks \"Sign out\" remains logged in until their 7-day session cookie expires naturally."}],"totalDurationMs":107428,"totalTokens":69716,"totalToolUseCount":47,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":923,"cache_read_input_tokens":66727,"output_tokens":2065,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":923},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"}}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01CrHVgTfAdHo55pxksMcwCo","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_016EUoJrDB1NSUSb9fSqqGE3","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"export GH_TOKEN=$(grep GH_TOKEN /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/.env | cut -d= -f2) && gh issue create --repo TommyBrennan/bookmate --title \"Code review round 6: logout broken, is_full stuck, missing email subjects\" --body \"$(cat <<'EOF'\n## Code Review Round 6\n\n### Critical\n1. **`session.destroy()` not awaited** — logout never clears the cookie. Users remain logged in until 7-day session expiry. Affects `logout/route.ts` and `me/route.ts`.\n2. **Increasing `maxGroupSize` never resets `is_full`** — listing stays permanently invisible after raising group cap.\n\n### Important\n3. **Missing email subject cases** for `group_full`, `telegram_ready`, `discord_ready` — all fall through to generic \"Bookmate: Notification\".\n4. **Discord webhook `handleLink` skips integer validation** on `listingId` — inconsistent with rest of codebase.\n5. **`BookSearch` fetch not aborted on unmount** — stale response race condition on rapid query changes.\n\n## Plan\nFix all 5 issues in a single PR with tests verifying the changes.\nEOF\n)\" --label \"approved,bug,P0\"","description":"Create issue for code review findings"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":3,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2880,"cache_read_input_tokens":34207,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":2880},"output_tokens":3,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"e0175717-b3d2-4a20-ae78-d8dc36390c5a","uuid":"7302b2d3-4139-4bc3-8f48-137bcaa6a2f6"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01S7vD8Wcs5TomNAb4ZWDAKh","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     3→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function GET() {\n     6→  const session = await getSession();\n     7→\n     8→  if (!session.userId) {\n     9→    return NextResponse.json({ user: null });\n    10→  }\n    11→\n    12→  const user = db\n    13→    .prepare(\"SELECT id, email, display_name, bio FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n    14→    .get(session.userId) as\n    15→    | { id: number; email: string; display_name: string; bio: string }\n    16→    | undefined;\n    17→\n    18→  if (!user) {\n    19→    session.destroy();\n    20→    return NextResponse.json({ user: null });\n    21→  }\n    22→\n    23→  // Include unread notification count to avoid a second round-trip from the Navbar\n    24→  const unread = db\n    25→    .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM notifications WHERE user_id = ? AND is_read = 0\")\n    26→    .get(session.userId) as { count: number };\n    27→\n    28→  return NextResponse.json({\n    29→    user: {\n    30→      id: user.id,\n    31→      email: user.email,\n    32→      displayName: user.display_name,\n    33→      bio: user.bio,\n    34→      unreadNotificationCount: unread.count,\n    35→    },\n    36→  });\n    37→}\n    38→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"e0175717-b3d2-4a20-ae78-d8dc36390c5a","uuid":"d81e689f-2d81-44c5-b38e-4b691241be20","timestamp":"2026-03-23T23:03:38.823Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/auth/me/route.ts","content":"import { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\n\nexport async function GET() {\n  const session = await getSession();\n\n  if (!session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ user: null });\n  }\n\n  const user = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT id, email, display_name, bio FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(session.userId) as\n    | { id: number; email: string; display_name: string; bio: string }\n    | undefined;\n\n  if (!user) {\n    session.destroy();\n    return NextResponse.json({ user: null });\n  }\n\n  // Include unread notification count to avoid a second round-trip from the Navbar\n  const unread = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM notifications WHERE user_id = ? AND is_read = 0\")\n    .get(session.userId) as { count: number };\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    user: {\n      id: user.id,\n      email: user.email,\n      displayName: user.display_name,\n      bio: user.bio,\n      unreadNotificationCount: unread.count,\n    },\n  });\n}\n","numLines":38,"startLine":1,"totalLines":38}}}

as { email: string } | undefined;\n     8→  return user?.email || null;\n     9→}\n    10→\n    11→export function createNotification(\n    12→  userId: number,\n    13→  listingId: number | null,\n    14→  type: string,\n    15→  message: string\n    16→) {\n    17→  db.prepare(\n    18→    \"INSERT INTO notifications (user_id, listing_id, type, message) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n    19→  ).run(userId, listingId, type, message);\n    20→\n    21→  // Also send email notification (fire-and-forget)\n    22→  const email = getUserEmail(userId);\n    23→  if (email) {\n    24→    const subject = getEmailSubject(type);\n    25→    sendEmail(email, subject, message).catch(() => {\n    26→      // Email sending is best-effort — don't block on failure\n    27→    });\n    28→  }\n    29→}\n    30→\n    31→function getEmailSubject(type: string): string {\n    32→  switch (type) {\n    33→    case \"new_member\":\n    34→      return \"Bookmate: Someone joined your reading group!\";\n    35→    case \"group_full\":\n    36→      return \"Bookmate: Your reading group is full!\";\n    37→    case \"application_received\":\n    38→      return \"Bookmate: New application for your reading group\";\n    39→    case \"application_approved\":\n    40→      return \"Bookmate: Your application was approved!\";\n    41→    case \"application_rejected\":\n    42→      return \"Bookmate: Application update\";\n    43→    case \"rating_received\":\n    44→      return \"Bookmate: You received a new rating\";\n    45→    case \"listing_deleted\":\n    46→      return \"Bookmate: A reading group has been cancelled\";\n    47→    case \"listing_updated\":\n    48→      return \"Bookmate: A reading group has been updated\";\n    49→    default:\n    50→      return \"Bookmate: Notification\";\n    51→  }\n    52→}\n    53→\n    54→export function notifyListingAuthor(\n    55→  listingId: number,\n    56→  joinerName: string\n    57→) {\n    58→  const listing = db\n    59→    .prepare(\n    60→      \"SELECT l.author_id, l.book_title FROM listings l WHERE l.id = ?\""}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"e0175717-b3d2-4a20-ae78-d8dc36390c5a","uuid":"101ff136-8359-474a-a903-f65bb0891822","timestamp":"2026-03-23T23:03:39.246Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/notifications.ts","content":"import db from \"./db\";\nimport { sendEmail } from \"./email\";\n\nfunction getUserEmail(userId: number): string | null {\n  const user = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT email FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(userId) as { email: string } | undefined;\n  return user?.email || null;\n}\n\nexport function createNotification(\n  userId: number,\n  listingId: number | null,\n  type: string,\n  message: string\n) {\n  db.prepare(\n    \"INSERT INTO notifications (user_id, listing_id, type, message) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n  ).run(userId, listingId, type, message);\n\n  // Also send email notification (fire-and-forget)\n  const email = getUserEmail(userId);\n  if (email) {\n    const subject = getEmailSubject(type);\n    sendEmail(email, subject, message).catch(() => {\n      // Email sending is best-effort — don't block on failure\n    });\n  }\n}\n\nfunction getEmailSubject(type: string): string {\n  switch (type) {\n    case \"new_member\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Someone joined your reading group!\";\n    case \"group_full\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Your reading group is full!\";\n    case \"application_received\":\n      return \"Bookmate: New application for your reading group\";\n    case \"application_approved\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Your application was approved!\";\n    case \"application_rejected\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Application update\";\n    case \"rating_received\":\n      return \"Bookmate: You received a new rating\";\n    case \"listing_deleted\":\n      return \"Bookmate: A reading group has been cancelled\";\n    case \"listing_updated\":\n      return \"Bookmate: A reading group has been updated\";\n    default:\n      return \"Bookmate: Notification\";\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyListingAuthor(\n  listingId: number,\n  joinerName: string\n) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT l.author_id, l.book_title FROM listings l WHERE l.id = ?\"","numLines":60,"startLine":1,"totalLines":141}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_018KhbroigPoq55qM3Lpunc7","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import {\n     4→  createTextChannel,\n     5→  createChannelInvite,\n     6→  sendChannelMessage,\n     7→} from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     8→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     9→\n    10→/**\n    11→ * Discord webhook endpoint for bot events.\n    12→ *\n    13→ * This endpoint handles:\n    14→ * 1. POST with { type: \"link\", guildId, listingId } - Link a Discord server to a listing\n    15→ *    (called by the bot or by an admin setup flow)\n    16→ *\n    17→ * Note: Unlike Telegram's push-based webhook, Discord uses Gateway (WebSocket)\n    18→ * for real-time events. This endpoint is used as an HTTP callback for\n    19→ * simpler integration scenarios or manual triggering.\n    20→ */\n    21→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    22→  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n    23→  const webhookSecret = process.env.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n    24→  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n    26→  }\n    27→  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\");\n    28→  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    29→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    30→  }\n    31→\n    32→  try {\n    33→    const body = await req.json();\n    34→    const { type } = body;\n    35→\n    36→    if (type === \"link\") {\n    37→      return handleLink(body);\n    38→    }\n    39→\n    40→    // Discord Interaction verification (for future slash command support)\n    41→    if (type === 1) {\n    42→      // PING - respond with PONG\n    43→      return NextResponse.json({ type: 1 });\n    44→    }\n    45→\n    46→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unknown event type\" }, { status: 400 });\n    47→  } catch (err) {\n    48→    console.error(\"Discord webhook error:\", err);\n    49→    return NextResponse.json(\n    50→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n    51→      { status: 500 }\n    52→    );\n    53→  }\n    54→}\n    55→\n    56→async function handleLink(body: {\n    57→  guildId: string;\n    58→  listingId: number;\n    59→  channelId?: string;\n    60→}) {\n    61→  const { guildId, listingId, channelId } = body;\n    62→\n    63→  if (!guildId || !listingId) {\n    64→    return NextResponse.json(\n    65→      { error: \"Missing guildId or listingId\" },\n    66→      { status: 400 }\n    67→    );\n    68→  }\n    69→\n    70→  const listing = db\n    71→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    72→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    73→\n    74→  if (!listing) {\n    75→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    76→  }\n    77→\n    78→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    79→    return NextResponse.json(\n    80→      { error: \"Cannot link Discord until the group is full\" },\n    81→      { status: 400 }\n    82→    );\n    83→  }\n    84→\n    85→  if (listing.discord_link) {\n    86→    return NextResponse.json(\n    87→      { error: \"Discord link already set for this listing\" },\n    88→      { status: 400 }\n    89→    );\n    90→  }\n    91→\n    92→  let targetChannelId = channelId;\n    93→\n    94→  // If no channel specified, create one\n    95→  if (!targetChannelId) {\n    96→    const bookTitle = String(listing.book_title || \"reading-group\");\n    97→    const channelName = `bookmate-${bookTitle\n    98→      .toLowerCase()\n    99→      .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, \"-\")\n   100→      .slice(0, 80)}`;"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"e0175717-b3d2-4a20-ae78-d8dc36390c5a","uuid":"d10eb33e-2352-4d3f-9316-55748c38c25c","timestamp":"2026-03-23T23:03:39.713Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/webhook/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport {\n  createTextChannel,\n  createChannelInvite,\n  sendChannelMessage,\n} from \"@/lib/discord\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\n/**\n * Discord webhook endpoint for bot events.\n *\n * This endpoint handles:\n * 1. POST with { type: \"link\", guildId, listingId } - Link a Discord server to a listing\n *    (called by the bot or by an admin setup flow)\n *\n * Note: Unlike Telegram's push-based webhook, Discord uses Gateway (WebSocket)\n * for real-time events. This endpoint is used as an HTTP callback for\n * simpler integration scenarios or manual triggering.\n */\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n  const webhookSecret = process.env.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\");\n  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const { type } = body;\n\n    if (type === \"link\") {\n      return handleLink(body);\n    }\n\n    // Discord Interaction verification (for future slash command support)\n    if (type === 1) {\n      // PING - respond with PONG\n      return NextResponse.json({ type: 1 });\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unknown event type\" }, { status: 400 });\n  } catch (err) {\n    console.error(\"Discord webhook error:\", err);\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n}\n\nasync function handleLink(body: {\n  guildId: string;\n  listingId: number;\n  channelId?: string;\n}) {\n  const { guildId, listingId, channelId } = body;\n\n  if (!guildId || !listingId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Missing guildId or listingId\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot link Discord until the group is full\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Discord link already set for this listing\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  let targetChannelId = channelId;\n\n  // If no channel specified, create one\n  if (!targetChannelId) {\n    const bookTitle = String(listing.book_title || \"reading-group\");\n    const channelName = `bookmate-${bookTitle\n      .toLowerCase()\n      .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, \"-\")\n      .slice(0, 80)}`;","numLines":100,"startLine":1,"totalLines":158}}}

{book.cover_i ?  207→                  style={{\n   208→                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   209→                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   210→                  }}\n 222→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"e0175717-b3d2-4a20-ae78-d8dc36390c5a","uuid":"bc6864cf-f058-47e3-b119-613859e9af40","timestamp":"2026-03-23T23:03:39.990Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/components/BookSearch.tsx","content":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useState, useEffect, useRef } from \"react\";\nimport Image from \"next/image\";\n\ninterface BookResult {\n  key: string;\n  title: string;\n  author_name?: string[];\n  cover_i?: number;\n}\n\ninterface Props {\n  onSelect: (book: {\n    title: string;\n    author: string;\n    coverUrl: string;\n    olid: string;\n  }) => void;\n}\n\nexport default function BookSearch({ onSelect }: Props) {\n  const [query, setQuery] = useState(\"\");\n  const [results, setResults] = useState<BookResult[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [activeIndex, setActiveIndex] = useState(-1);\n  const timeoutRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n  const listboxRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const handler = (e: MouseEvent) => {\n      if (\n        containerRef.current &&\n        !containerRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)\n      ) {\n        setOpen(false);\n      }\n    };\n    document.addEventListener(\"mousedown\", handler);\n    return () => document.removeEventListener(\"mousedown\", handler);\n  }, []);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (query.length < 3) {\n      setResults([]);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n\n    timeoutRef.current = setTimeout(async () => {\n      setLoading(true);\n      try {\n        const res = await fetch(\n          `https://openlibrary.org/search.json?q=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&limit=8&fields=key,title,author_name,cover_i`\n        );\n        const data = await res.json();\n        setResults(data.docs || []);\n        setOpen(true);\n        setActiveIndex(-1);\n      } catch {\n        setResults([]);\n      } finally {\n        setLoading(false);\n      }\n    }, 400);\n\n    return () => {\n      if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n    };\n  }, [query]);\n\n  const handleSelect = (book: BookResult) => {\n    const olid = book.key.replace(\"/works/\", \"\");\n    onSelect({\n      title: book.title,\n      author: book.author_name?.[0] || \"Unknown author\",\n      coverUrl: book.cover_i\n        ? `https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/${book.cover_i}-M.jpg`\n        : \"\",\n      olid,\n    });\n    setQuery(book.title);\n    setOpen(false);\n    setActiveIndex(-1);\n  };\n\n  const handleKeyDown = (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {\n    if (!open || results.length === 0) return;\n\n    switch (e.key) {\n      case \"ArrowDown\":\n        e.preventDefault();\n        setActiveIndex((prev) => (prev < results.length - 1 ? prev + 1 : 0));\n        break;\n      case \"ArrowUp\":\n        e.preventDefault();\n        setActiveIndex((prev) => (prev > 0 ? prev - 1 : results.length - 1));\n        break;\n      case \"Enter\":\n        e.preventDefault();\n        if (activeIndex >= 0 && activeIndex < results.length) {\n          handleSelect(results[activeIndex]);\n        }\n        break;\n      case \"Escape\":\n        setOpen(false);\n        setActiveIndex(-1);\n        break;\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Scroll active option into view\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (activeIndex >= 0 && listboxRef.current) {\n      const activeEl = listboxRef.current.children[activeIndex] as HTMLElement;\n      if (activeEl) {\n        activeEl.scrollIntoView({ block: \"nearest\" });\n      }\n    }\n  }, [activeIndex]);\n\n  const activeDescendant =\n    activeIndex >= 0 && results[activeIndex]\n      ? `book-option-${results[activeIndex].key}`\n      : undefined;\n\n  return (\n    <div ref={containerRef} className=\"relative\">\n      <input\n        type=\"text\"\n        className=\"input-field\"\n        value={query}\n        onChange={(e) => setQuery(e.target.value)}\n        onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}\n        placeholder=\"Search for a book title...\"\n        onFocus={() => results.length > 0 && setOpen(true)}\n        role=\"combobox\"\n        aria-expanded={open && results.length > 0}\n        aria-haspopup=\"listbox\"\n        aria-controls=\"book-search-listbox\"\n        aria-activedescendant={activeDescendant}\n        aria-label=\"Search for a book\"\n        aria-autocomplete=\"list\"\n      />\n      {loading && (\n        <div\n          className=\"absolute right-3 top-3 text-xs\"\n          style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          role=\"status\"\n          aria-live=\"polite\"\n        >\n          Searching...\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {open && results.length > 0 && (\n        <div\n          ref={listboxRef}\n          id=\"book-search-listbox\"\n          role=\"listbox\"\n          aria-label=\"Book search results\"\n          className=\"absolute z-10 w-full mt-1 card shadow-lg max-h-72 overflow-y-auto\"\n          style={{ padding: \"0.5rem 0\" }}\n        >\n          {results.map((book, index) => (\n            <button\n              key={book.key}\n              id={`book-option-${book.key}`}\n              type=\"button\"\n              role=\"option\"\n              aria-selected={index === activeIndex}\n              onClick={() => handleSelect(book)}\n              className=\"w-full text-left px-4 py-2 hover:bg-gray-50 flex items-center gap-3 cursor-pointer\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: index === activeIndex ? \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04)\" : undefined,\n              }}\n            >\n              {book.cover_i ? (\n                <Image\n                  src={`https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/${book.cover_i}-S.jpg`}\n                  alt={`Cover of ${book.title}`}\n                  width={32}\n                  height={48}\n                  className=\"w-8 h-12 object-cover rounded\"\n                />\n              ) : (\n                <div\n                  className=\"w-8 h-12 rounded flex items-center justify-center text-sm\"\n                  style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-border)\" }}\n                  aria-hidden=\"true\"\n                >\n                  <span role=\"img\" aria-hidden=\"true\">📖</span>\n                </div>\n              )}\n              <div className=\"min-w-0\">\n                <div\n                  className=\"text-sm font-semibold truncate\"\n                  style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                >\n                  {book.title}\n                </div>\n                <div\n                  className=\"text-xs truncate\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  {book.author_name?.[0] || \"Unknown author\"}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </button>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","numLines":222,"startLine":1,"totalLines":222}}}

215→      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n   216→      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n   217→    }\n   218→    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n   219→      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n  }\n   226→    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n   227→      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n   228→      values.push(parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10));\n   229→    }\n   230→    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n   231→      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n   232→      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n   233→    }\n   234→    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n   235→      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n   236→      values.push(platformPreference);\n   237→    }\n   238→\n   239→    if (updates.length === 0) {\n   240→      return WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n   245→\n   246→    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n   247→  } catch (error) {\n   248→    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n   249→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"e0175717-b3d2-4a20-ae78-d8dc36390c5a","uuid":"0fcd98a1-74a6-4f21-9284-5060c526bf60","timestamp":"2026-03-23T23:03:44.494Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","content":"      if (startDate < today) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      const size = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n\n      // Cannot reduce below current member count\n      const memberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n      if (size < memberCount) {\n        return NextResponse.json(\n          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n          { status: 400 }\n        );\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n    const updates: string[] = [];\n    const values: unknown[] = [];\n\n    if (language !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n      values.push(language);\n    }\n    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n    }\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n      values.push(startDate);\n    }\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n      values.push(meetingFormat);\n    }\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n      values.push(parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10));\n    }\n    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n    }\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n      values.push(platformPreference);\n    }\n\n    if (updates.length === 0) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    values.push(listingId);\n    db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });","numLines":80,"startLine":170,"totalLines":325}}}
