{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01ECdJ3JQvsYjJVLtpSeYrRV","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01HVmRLN2YPFA42Eun1upZfg","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/auth/me/route.ts","old_string":"    session.destroy();\n    return NextResponse.json({ user: null });","new_string":"    await session.destroy();\n    return NextResponse.json({ user: null });"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":141,"cache_read_input_tokens":44386,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":141},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"e0175717-b3d2-4a20-ae78-d8dc36390c5a","uuid":"0269c4b6-8d1e-46a1-b3b5-b5ba95fef14e"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01HVmRLN2YPFA42Eun1upZfg","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/auth/me/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"e0175717-b3d2-4a20-ae78-d8dc36390c5a","uuid":"3813536e-8c6f-4e08-a65c-ae6354d4e119","timestamp":"2026-03-23T23:04:02.730Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/auth/me/route.ts","oldString":"    session.destroy();\n    return NextResponse.json({ user: null });","newString":"    await session.destroy();\n    return NextResponse.json({ user: null });","originalFile":"import { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\n\nexport async function GET() {\n  const session = await getSession();\n\n  if (!session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ user: null });\n  }\n\n  const user = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT id, email, display_name, bio FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(session.userId) as\n    | { id: number; email: string; display_name: string; bio: string }\n    | undefined;\n\n  if (!user) {\n    session.destroy();\n    return NextResponse.json({ user: null });\n  }\n\n  // Include unread notification count to avoid a second round-trip from the Navbar\n  const unread = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM notifications WHERE user_id = ? AND is_read = 0\")\n    .get(session.userId) as { count: number };\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    user: {\n      id: user.id,\n      email: user.email,\n      displayName: user.display_name,\n      bio: user.bio,\n      unreadNotificationCount: unread.count,\n    },\n  });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":16,"oldLines":7,"newStart":16,"newLines":7,"lines":["     | undefined;"," ","   if (!user) {","-    session.destroy();","+    await session.destroy();","     return NextResponse.json({ user: null });","   }"," "]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01ECdJ3JQvsYjJVLtpSeYrRV","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01BbQHrNXfbHLab7xBb82E3R","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","old_string":"    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n      values.push(parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10));\n    }","new_string":"    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      const newSize = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n      values.push(newSize);\n\n      // If increasing group size on a full listing, reopen it\n      const currentMemberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n      if (newSize > currentMemberCount && listing.is_full) {\n        updates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n        values.push(0);\n      }\n    }"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":141,"cache_read_input_tokens":44386,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":141},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"e0175717-b3d2-4a20-ae78-d8dc36390c5a","uuid":"5f5cc344-a968-49e2-aa81-be7f457c473a"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01BbQHrNXfbHLab7xBb82E3R","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"e0175717-b3d2-4a20-ae78-d8dc36390c5a","uuid":"953a4f7d-5828-4534-8b4c-6b897e9a95fc","timestamp":"2026-03-23T23:04:05.892Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","oldString":"    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n      values.push(parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10));\n    }","newString":"    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      const newSize = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n      values.push(newSize);\n\n      // If increasing group size on a full listing, reopen it\n      const currentMemberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n      if (newSize > currentMemberCount && listing.is_full) {\n        updates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n        values.push(0);\n      }\n    }","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { getSession, requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\nimport { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n\nexport async function GET(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        l.*,\n        u.display_name as author_name\n      FROM listings l\n      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n       FROM listing_members lm\n       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    )\n    .all(listingId) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n\n  const session = await getSession();\n  const isMember = session.userId\n    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    : false;\n  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    : false;\n\n  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Check if the current user has an application (regardless of requires_approval,\n  // since the flag may have been toggled after the application was submitted)\n  let hasApplied = false;\n  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n  if (session.userId && !isMember) {\n    const app = db\n      .prepare(\n        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n      )\n      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    if (app) {\n      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n  if (isAuthor && listing.requires_approval) {\n    pendingApplicants = db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n         FROM listing_applications la\n         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n      )\n      .all(listingId) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n  }\n\n  // Strip platform links for non-members to prevent leaking invite URLs\n  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    listing: {\n      ...safeListingData,\n      members,\n      memberCount: members.length,\n      isMember,\n      isAuthor,\n      hasApplied,\n      applicationStatus,\n      pendingApplicants,\n      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n    },\n  });\n}\n\nexport async function PATCH(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can edit this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot edit if a platform link has been shared (group already formed)\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const {\n      language,\n      readingPace,\n      startDate,\n      meetingFormat,\n      maxGroupSize,\n      requiresApproval,\n      platformPreference,\n    } = body;\n\n    // Validate fields that are provided\n    if (readingPace !== undefined && (!readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      if (!/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n      if (startDate < today) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      const size = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n\n      // Cannot reduce below current member count\n      const memberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n      if (size < memberCount) {\n        return NextResponse.json(\n          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n          { status: 400 }\n        );\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n    const updates: string[] = [];\n    const values: unknown[] = [];\n\n    if (language !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n      values.push(language);\n    }\n    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n    }\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n      values.push(startDate);\n    }\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n      values.push(meetingFormat);\n    }\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n      values.push(parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10));\n    }\n    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n    }\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n      values.push(platformPreference);\n    }\n\n    if (updates.length === 0) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    values.push(listingId);\n    db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function DELETE(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can delete this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot delete if a platform link has been shared\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot delete a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    // Get members to notify (excluding the author)\n    const members = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n      .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n    // Delete in a transaction (notifications sent after, so they aren't wiped)\n    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    });\n\n    deleteTransaction();\n\n    // Send deletion notifications after transaction (listing_id is NULL since listing is gone)\n    for (const member of members) {\n      try {\n        createNotification(\n          member.user_id,\n          null,\n          \"listing_deleted\",\n          `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n        );\n      } catch {\n        // Notification failure should not block response\n      }\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Delete listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":224,"oldLines":8,"newStart":224,"newLines":18,"lines":["       values.push(meetingFormat);","     }","     if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {","+      const newSize = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);","       updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");","-      values.push(parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10));","+      values.push(newSize);","+","+      // If increasing group size on a full listing, reopen it","+      const currentMemberCount = (db","+        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")","+        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;","+      if (newSize > currentMemberCount && listing.is_full) {","+        updates.push(\"is_full = ?\");","+        values.push(0);","+      }","     }","     if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {","       updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"stream_event","event":{"type":"message_stop"},"session_id":"e0175717-b3d2-4a20-ae78-d8dc36390c5a","parent_tool_use_id":null,"uuid":"99f8232a-ee2b-431d-abbf-dae9fcbcd247"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_018EGoLAQpkGYxzLuUoe4VYe","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/webhook/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"e0175717-b3d2-4a20-ae78-d8dc36390c5a","uuid":"6af67e6f-6a53-42e1-bb6e-509eaa8873ca","timestamp":"2026-03-23T23:04:07.983Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/webhook/route.ts","oldString":"  if (!guildId || !listingId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Missing guildId or listingId\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }","newString":"  if (!guildId || !listingId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Missing guildId or listingId\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (typeof listingId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(listingId) || listingId < 1) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport {\n  createTextChannel,\n  createChannelInvite,\n  sendChannelMessage,\n} from \"@/lib/discord\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\n/**\n * Discord webhook endpoint for bot events.\n *\n * This endpoint handles:\n * 1. POST with { type: \"link\", guildId, listingId } - Link a Discord server to a listing\n *    (called by the bot or by an admin setup flow)\n *\n * Note: Unlike Telegram's push-based webhook, Discord uses Gateway (WebSocket)\n * for real-time events. This endpoint is used as an HTTP callback for\n * simpler integration scenarios or manual triggering.\n */\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n  const webhookSecret = process.env.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\");\n  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const { type } = body;\n\n    if (type === \"link\") {\n      return handleLink(body);\n    }\n\n    // Discord Interaction verification (for future slash command support)\n    if (type === 1) {\n      // PING - respond with PONG\n      return NextResponse.json({ type: 1 });\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unknown event type\" }, { status: 400 });\n  } catch (err) {\n    console.error(\"Discord webhook error:\", err);\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n}\n\nasync function handleLink(body: {\n  guildId: string;\n  listingId: number;\n  channelId?: string;\n}) {\n  const { guildId, listingId, channelId } = body;\n\n  if (!guildId || !listingId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Missing guildId or listingId\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot link Discord until the group is full\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Discord link already set for this listing\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  let targetChannelId = channelId;\n\n  // If no channel specified, create one\n  if (!targetChannelId) {\n    const bookTitle = String(listing.book_title || \"reading-group\");\n    const channelName = `bookmate-${bookTitle\n      .toLowerCase()\n      .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, \"-\")\n      .slice(0, 80)}`;\n\n    const channel = await createTextChannel(\n      guildId,\n      channelName,\n      `Bookmate reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" by ${listing.book_author}`\n    );\n\n    if (!channel) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Failed to create Discord channel. Make sure the bot has Manage Channels permission.\" },\n        { status: 500 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    targetChannelId = channel.id;\n  }\n\n  // Create invite link\n  const inviteLink = await createChannelInvite(targetChannelId);\n  if (!inviteLink) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Failed to create invite link. Make sure the bot has Create Instant Invite permission.\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Save to DB\n  db.prepare(\n    \"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ?, discord_channel_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n  ).run(inviteLink, targetChannelId, listingId);\n\n  // Notify all members\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n  for (const member of members) {\n    createNotification(\n      member.user_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"discord_ready\",\n      `The Discord channel for \"${listing.book_title}\" is ready! Join to start discussing.`\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Send welcome message to the channel\n  await sendChannelMessage(\n    targetChannelId,\n    `Welcome to the **${listing.book_title}** reading group! 📚\\n\\n` +\n      `This channel was created by Bookmate for your reading group.\\n` +\n      `**Reading pace:** ${listing.reading_pace}\\n` +\n      `**Start date:** ${listing.start_date}\\n\\n` +\n      `Happy reading! 🎉`\n  );\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, inviteLink });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":67,"oldLines":6,"newStart":67,"newLines":13,"lines":["     );","   }"," ","+  if (typeof listingId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(listingId) || listingId < 1) {","+    return NextResponse.json(","+      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },","+      { status: 400 }","+    );","+  }","+","   const listing = db","     .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")","     .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01BBtSycwKPbXQWXoxmjfK4X","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/notifications.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"e0175717-b3d2-4a20-ae78-d8dc36390c5a","uuid":"bda24b5b-94e4-44dc-ba76-e37c8d150105","timestamp":"2026-03-23T23:04:18.678Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/notifications.ts","oldString":"    case \"listing_updated\":\n      return \"Bookmate: A reading group has been updated\";\n    default:","newString":"    case \"listing_updated\":\n      return \"Bookmate: A reading group has been updated\";\n    case \"telegram_ready\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Your Telegram reading group is ready!\";\n    case \"discord_ready\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Your Discord channel is ready!\";\n    default:","originalFile":"import db from \"./db\";\nimport { sendEmail } from \"./email\";\n\nfunction getUserEmail(userId: number): string | null {\n  const user = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT email FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(userId) as { email: string } | undefined;\n  return user?.email || null;\n}\n\nexport function createNotification(\n  userId: number,\n  listingId: number | null,\n  type: string,\n  message: string\n) {\n  db.prepare(\n    \"INSERT INTO notifications (user_id, listing_id, type, message) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n  ).run(userId, listingId, type, message);\n\n  // Also send email notification (fire-and-forget)\n  const email = getUserEmail(userId);\n  if (email) {\n    const subject = getEmailSubject(type);\n    sendEmail(email, subject, message).catch(() => {\n      // Email sending is best-effort — don't block on failure\n    });\n  }\n}\n\nfunction getEmailSubject(type: string): string {\n  switch (type) {\n    case \"new_member\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Someone joined your reading group!\";\n    case \"group_full\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Your reading group is full!\";\n    case \"application_received\":\n      return \"Bookmate: New application for your reading group\";\n    case \"application_approved\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Your application was approved!\";\n    case \"application_rejected\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Application update\";\n    case \"rating_received\":\n      return \"Bookmate: You received a new rating\";\n    case \"listing_deleted\":\n      return \"Bookmate: A reading group has been cancelled\";\n    case \"listing_updated\":\n      return \"Bookmate: A reading group has been updated\";\n    default:\n      return \"Bookmate: Notification\";\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyListingAuthor(\n  listingId: number,\n  joinerName: string\n) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT l.author_id, l.book_title FROM listings l WHERE l.id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; book_title: string } | undefined;\n\n  if (listing) {\n    createNotification(\n      listing.author_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"new_member\",\n      `${joinerName} joined your reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n    );\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyApplicationReceived(\n  listingId: number,\n  applicantName: string\n) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT l.author_id, l.book_title FROM listings l WHERE l.id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; book_title: string } | undefined;\n\n  if (listing) {\n    createNotification(\n      listing.author_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"application_received\",\n      `${applicantName} applied to join your reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n    );\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyApplicationDecision(\n  userId: number,\n  listingId: number,\n  decision: \"approved\" | \"rejected\"\n) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string } | undefined;\n\n  if (listing) {\n    const type = decision === \"approved\" ? \"application_approved\" : \"application_rejected\";\n    const message =\n      decision === \"approved\"\n        ? `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was approved!`\n        : `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was not accepted.`;\n    createNotification(userId, listingId, type, message);\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyGroupFull(listingId: number) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title, platform_preference, author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string; platform_preference: string; author_id: number } | undefined;\n  // Exclude the author — they already received a separate \"new_member\" notification\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n    .all(listingId, listing?.author_id ?? -1) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n  if (listing) {\n    const platform = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\" ? \"Discord\" : \"Telegram\";\n    const botConfigured = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\"\n      ? !!process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN\n      : !!process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN;\n    const message = botConfigured\n      ? `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The ${platform} group will be set up automatically.`\n      : `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The organizer will share a ${platform} link soon.`;\n\n    for (const member of members) {\n      createNotification(\n        member.user_id,\n        listingId,\n        \"group_full\",\n        message\n      );\n    }\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":46,"oldLines":6,"newStart":46,"newLines":10,"lines":["       return \"Bookmate: A reading group has been cancelled\";","     case \"listing_updated\":","       return \"Bookmate: A reading group has been updated\";","+    case \"telegram_ready\":","+      return \"Bookmate: Your Telegram reading group is ready!\";","+    case \"discord_ready\":","+      return \"Bookmate: Your Discord channel is ready!\";","     default:","       return \"Bookmate: Notification\";","   }"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01YWjWxU1nqKghMAcFngf4PC","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/components/BookSearch.tsx has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"e0175717-b3d2-4a20-ae78-d8dc36390c5a","uuid":"54f47f9c-29b5-4459-a27a-84bdd9a4014d","timestamp":"2026-03-23T23:04:23.934Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/components/BookSearch.tsx","oldString":"  const [activeIndex, setActiveIndex] = useState(-1);\n  const timeoutRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);","newString":"  const [activeIndex, setActiveIndex] = useState(-1);\n  const timeoutRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n  const abortRef = useRef<AbortController>(undefined);\n  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);","originalFile":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useState, useEffect, useRef } from \"react\";\nimport Image from \"next/image\";\n\ninterface BookResult {\n  key: string;\n  title: string;\n  author_name?: string[];\n  cover_i?: number;\n}\n\ninterface Props {\n  onSelect: (book: {\n    title: string;\n    author: string;\n    coverUrl: string;\n    olid: string;\n  }) => void;\n}\n\nexport default function BookSearch({ onSelect }: Props) {\n  const [query, setQuery] = useState(\"\");\n  const [results, setResults] = useState<BookResult[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [activeIndex, setActiveIndex] = useState(-1);\n  const timeoutRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n  const listboxRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const handler = (e: MouseEvent) => {\n      if (\n        containerRef.current &&\n        !containerRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)\n      ) {\n        setOpen(false);\n      }\n    };\n    document.addEventListener(\"mousedown\", handler);\n    return () => document.removeEventListener(\"mousedown\", handler);\n  }, []);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (query.length < 3) {\n      setResults([]);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n\n    timeoutRef.current = setTimeout(async () => {\n      setLoading(true);\n      try {\n        const res = await fetch(\n          `https://openlibrary.org/search.json?q=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&limit=8&fields=key,title,author_name,cover_i`\n        );\n        const data = await res.json();\n        setResults(data.docs || []);\n        setOpen(true);\n        setActiveIndex(-1);\n      } catch {\n        setResults([]);\n      } finally {\n        setLoading(false);\n      }\n    }, 400);\n\n    return () => {\n      if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n    };\n  }, [query]);\n\n  const handleSelect = (book: BookResult) => {\n    const olid = book.key.replace(\"/works/\", \"\");\n    onSelect({\n      title: book.title,\n      author: book.author_name?.[0] || \"Unknown author\",\n      coverUrl: book.cover_i\n        ? `https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/${book.cover_i}-M.jpg`\n        : \"\",\n      olid,\n    });\n    setQuery(book.title);\n    setOpen(false);\n    setActiveIndex(-1);\n  };\n\n  const handleKeyDown = (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {\n    if (!open || results.length === 0) return;\n\n    switch (e.key) {\n      case \"ArrowDown\":\n        e.preventDefault();\n        setActiveIndex((prev) => (prev < results.length - 1 ? prev + 1 : 0));\n        break;\n      case \"ArrowUp\":\n        e.preventDefault();\n        setActiveIndex((prev) => (prev > 0 ? prev - 1 : results.length - 1));\n        break;\n      case \"Enter\":\n        e.preventDefault();\n        if (activeIndex >= 0 && activeIndex < results.length) {\n          handleSelect(results[activeIndex]);\n        }\n        break;\n      case \"Escape\":\n        setOpen(false);\n        setActiveIndex(-1);\n        break;\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Scroll active option into view\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (activeIndex >= 0 && listboxRef.current) {\n      const activeEl = listboxRef.current.children[activeIndex] as HTMLElement;\n      if (activeEl) {\n        activeEl.scrollIntoView({ block: \"nearest\" });\n      }\n    }\n  }, [activeIndex]);\n\n  const activeDescendant =\n    activeIndex >= 0 && results[activeIndex]\n      ? `book-option-${results[activeIndex].key}`\n      : undefined;\n\n  return (\n    <div ref={containerRef} className=\"relative\">\n      <input\n        type=\"text\"\n        className=\"input-field\"\n        value={query}\n        onChange={(e) => setQuery(e.target.value)}\n        onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}\n        placeholder=\"Search for a book title...\"\n        onFocus={() => results.length > 0 && setOpen(true)}\n        role=\"combobox\"\n        aria-expanded={open && results.length > 0}\n        aria-haspopup=\"listbox\"\n        aria-controls=\"book-search-listbox\"\n        aria-activedescendant={activeDescendant}\n        aria-label=\"Search for a book\"\n        aria-autocomplete=\"list\"\n      />\n      {loading && (\n        <div\n          className=\"absolute right-3 top-3 text-xs\"\n          style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          role=\"status\"\n          aria-live=\"polite\"\n        >\n          Searching...\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {open && results.length > 0 && (\n        <div\n          ref={listboxRef}\n          id=\"book-search-listbox\"\n          role=\"listbox\"\n          aria-label=\"Book search results\"\n          className=\"absolute z-10 w-full mt-1 card shadow-lg max-h-72 overflow-y-auto\"\n          style={{ padding: \"0.5rem 0\" }}\n        >\n          {results.map((book, index) => (\n            <button\n              key={book.key}\n              id={`book-option-${book.key}`}\n              type=\"button\"\n              role=\"option\"\n              aria-selected={index === activeIndex}\n              onClick={() => handleSelect(book)}\n              className=\"w-full text-left px-4 py-2 hover:bg-gray-50 flex items-center gap-3 cursor-pointer\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: index === activeIndex ? \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04)\" : undefined,\n              }}\n            >\n              {book.cover_i ? (\n                <Image\n                  src={`https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/${book.cover_i}-S.jpg`}\n                  alt={`Cover of ${book.title}`}\n                  width={32}\n                  height={48}\n                  className=\"w-8 h-12 object-cover rounded\"\n                />\n              ) : (\n                <div\n                  className=\"w-8 h-12 rounded flex items-center justify-center text-sm\"\n                  style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-border)\" }}\n                  aria-hidden=\"true\"\n                >\n                  <span role=\"img\" aria-hidden=\"true\">📖</span>\n                </div>\n              )}\n              <div className=\"min-w-0\">\n                <div\n                  className=\"text-sm font-semibold truncate\"\n                  style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                >\n                  {book.title}\n                </div>\n                <div\n                  className=\"text-xs truncate\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  {book.author_name?.[0] || \"Unknown author\"}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </button>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":26,"oldLines":6,"newStart":26,"newLines":7,"lines":["   const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);","   const [activeIndex, setActiveIndex] = useState(-1);","   const timeoutRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);","+  const abortRef = useRef<AbortController>(undefined);","   const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);","   const listboxRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);"," "]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

   if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n\n    timeoutRef.current = setTimeout(async () => {\n      setLoading(true);\n      try {\n        const res = await fetch(\n          `https://openlibrary.org/search.json?q=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&limit=8&fields=key,title,author_name,cover_i`\n        );\n        const data = await res.json();\n        setResults(data.docs || []);\n        setOpen(true);\n        setActiveIndex(-1);\n      } catch {\n        setResults([]);\n      } finally {\n        setLoading(false);\n      }\n    }, 400);\n\n    return () => {\n      if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n    };","newString":"    if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n    if (abortRef.current) abortRef.current.abort();\n\n    const controller = new AbortController();\n    abortRef.current = controller;\n\n    timeoutRef.current = setTimeout(async () => {\n      setLoading(true);\n      try {\n        const res = await fetch(\n          `https://openlibrary.org/search.json?q=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&limit=8&fields=key,title,author_name,cover_i`,\n          { signal: controller.signal }\n        );\n        const data = await res.json();\n        setResults(data.docs || []);\n        setOpen(true);\n        setActiveIndex(-1);\n      } catch (err) {\n        if ((err as Error).name !== \"AbortError\") {\n          setResults([]);\n        }\n      } finally {\n        if (!controller.signal.aborted) {\n          setLoading(false);\n        }\n      }\n    }, 400);\n\n    return () => {\n      if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n      controller.abort();\n    };","originalFile":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useState, useEffect, useRef } from \"react\";\nimport Image from \"next/image\";\n\ninterface BookResult {\n  key: string;\n  title: string;\n  author_name?: string[];\n  cover_i?: number;\n}\n\ninterface Props {\n  onSelect: (book: {\n    title: string;\n    author: string;\n    coverUrl: string;\n    olid: string;\n  }) => void;\n}\n\nexport default function BookSearch({ onSelect }: Props) {\n  const [query, setQuery] = useState(\"\");\n  const [results, setResults] = useState<BookResult[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [activeIndex, setActiveIndex] = useState(-1);\n  const timeoutRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n  const abortRef = useRef<AbortController>(undefined);\n  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n  const listboxRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const handler = (e: MouseEvent) => {\n      if (\n        containerRef.current &&\n        !containerRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)\n      ) {\n        setOpen(false);\n      }\n    };\n    document.addEventListener(\"mousedown\", handler);\n    return () => document.removeEventListener(\"mousedown\", handler);\n  }, []);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (query.length < 3) {\n      setResults([]);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n\n    timeoutRef.current = setTimeout(async () => {\n      setLoading(true);\n      try {\n        const res = await fetch(\n          `https://openlibrary.org/search.json?q=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&limit=8&fields=key,title,author_name,cover_i`\n        );\n        const data = await res.json();\n        setResults(data.docs || []);\n        setOpen(true);\n        setActiveIndex(-1);\n      } catch {\n        setResults([]);\n      } finally {\n        setLoading(false);\n      }\n    }, 400);\n\n    return () => {\n      if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n    };\n  }, [query]);\n\n  const handleSelect = (book: BookResult) => {\n    const olid = book.key.replace(\"/works/\", \"\");\n    onSelect({\n      title: book.title,\n      author: book.author_name?.[0] || \"Unknown author\",\n      coverUrl: book.cover_i\n        ? `https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/${book.cover_i}-M.jpg`\n        : \"\",\n      olid,\n    });\n    setQuery(book.title);\n    setOpen(false);\n    setActiveIndex(-1);\n  };\n\n  const handleKeyDown = (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {\n    if (!open || results.length === 0) return;\n\n    switch (e.key) {\n      case \"ArrowDown\":\n        e.preventDefault();\n        setActiveIndex((prev) => (prev < results.length - 1 ? prev + 1 : 0));\n        break;\n      case \"ArrowUp\":\n        e.preventDefault();\n        setActiveIndex((prev) => (prev > 0 ? prev - 1 : results.length - 1));\n        break;\n      case \"Enter\":\n        e.preventDefault();\n        if (activeIndex >= 0 && activeIndex < results.length) {\n          handleSelect(results[activeIndex]);\n        }\n        break;\n      case \"Escape\":\n        setOpen(false);\n        setActiveIndex(-1);\n        break;\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Scroll active option into view\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (activeIndex >= 0 && listboxRef.current) {\n      const activeEl = listboxRef.current.children[activeIndex] as HTMLElement;\n      if (activeEl) {\n        activeEl.scrollIntoView({ block: \"nearest\" });\n      }\n    }\n  }, [activeIndex]);\n\n  const activeDescendant =\n    activeIndex >= 0 && results[activeIndex]\n      ? `book-option-${results[activeIndex].key}`\n      : undefined;\n\n  return (\n    <div ref={containerRef} className=\"relative\">\n      <input\n        type=\"text\"\n        className=\"input-field\"\n        value={query}\n        onChange={(e) => setQuery(e.target.value)}\n        onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}\n        placeholder=\"Search for a book title...\"\n        onFocus={() => results.length > 0 && setOpen(true)}\n        role=\"combobox\"\n        aria-expanded={open && results.length > 0}\n        aria-haspopup=\"listbox\"\n        aria-controls=\"book-search-listbox\"\n        aria-activedescendant={activeDescendant}\n        aria-label=\"Search for a book\"\n        aria-autocomplete=\"list\"\n      />\n      {loading && (\n        <div\n          className=\"absolute right-3 top-3 text-xs\"\n          style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          role=\"status\"\n          aria-live=\"polite\"\n        >\n          Searching...\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {open && results.length > 0 && (\n        <div\n          ref={listboxRef}\n          id=\"book-search-listbox\"\n          role=\"listbox\"\n          aria-label=\"Book search results\"\n          className=\"absolute z-10 w-full mt-1 card shadow-lg max-h-72 overflow-y-auto\"\n          style={{ padding: \"0.5rem 0\" }}\n        >\n          {results.map((book, index) => (\n            <button\n              key={book.key}\n              id={`book-option-${book.key}`}\n              type=\"button\"\n              role=\"option\"\n              aria-selected={index === activeIndex}\n              onClick={() => handleSelect(book)}\n              className=\"w-full text-left px-4 py-2 hover:bg-gray-50 flex items-center gap-3 cursor-pointer\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: index === activeIndex ? \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04)\" : undefined,\n              }}\n            >\n              {book.cover_i ? (\n                <Image\n                  src={`https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/${book.cover_i}-S.jpg`}\n                  alt={`Cover of ${book.title}`}\n                  width={32}\n                  height={48}\n                  className=\"w-8 h-12 object-cover rounded\"\n                />\n              ) : (\n                <div\n                  className=\"w-8 h-12 rounded flex items-center justify-center text-sm\"\n                  style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-border)\" }}\n                  aria-hidden=\"true\"\n                >\n                  <span role=\"img\" aria-hidden=\"true\">📖</span>\n                </div>\n              )}\n              <div className=\"min-w-0\">\n                <div\n                  className=\"text-sm font-semibold truncate\"\n                  style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                >\n                  {book.title}\n                </div>\n                <div\n                  className=\"text-xs truncate\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  {book.author_name?.[0] || \"Unknown author\"}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </button>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01VbcuF1GBUUgbyHXWMK5NWH","type":"tool_result","content":"   130→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   131→\n   132→  if (!listing) {\n   133→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n   134→  }\n   135→\n   136→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01PUrVz7oBGbDCCGVHeAQAQp","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01A3Kv7Saqt77auKqCToTzTX","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"git commit -m \"$(cat <<'EOF'\nfix: await session.destroy(), reset is_full on group resize, missing email subjects (#86)\n\n- Await session.destroy() in logout and me routes so cookie is actually cleared\n- Reset is_full flag when author increases maxGroupSize above current member count\n- Add email subject cases for telegram_ready and discord_ready notifications\n- Validate listingId as positive integer in Discord webhook handleLink\n- Add AbortController to BookSearch fetch to prevent stale response race conditions\n\nCo-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>\nEOF\n)\"","description":"Commit all fixes"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":306,"cache_read_input_tokens":48782,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":306},"output_tokens":51,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"e0175717-b3d2-4a20-ae78-d8dc36390c5a","uuid":"9d0214a6-656c-4c4f-af53-2bd035cc22bb"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_018ZKojkVXpZvMrzzNJMjUo5","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01GCkKLwV4FVLpAA9huoWMbo","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"export GH_TOKEN=$(grep GH_TOKEN /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/.env | cut -d= -f2) && gh pr create --repo TommyBrennan/bookmate --title \"Fix: logout, is_full reset, email subjects, webhook validation, fetch abort\" --body \"$(cat <<'EOF'\n## Summary\nFixes 5 bugs found in code review round 6 (#86):\n\n- **`session.destroy()` not awaited** — logout and stale-session cleanup never cleared the cookie, so users remained logged in until the 7-day session expiry\n- **`is_full` not reset on group resize** — increasing `maxGroupSize` on a full listing left it permanently invisible in browse\n- **Missing email subject cases** — `telegram_ready` and `discord_ready` notifications fell through to generic \"Bookmate: Notification\" subject\n- **Discord webhook missing `listingId` validation** — accepted non-integer/negative values unlike the rest of the codebase\n- **`BookSearch` fetch race condition** — added `AbortController` to cancel in-flight requests on unmount or rapid query changes\n\n## Test plan\n- [x] ESLint clean\n- [x] 197 tests pass\n- [x] Build passes\n- [ ] CI passes\n\n🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)\nEOF\n)\"","description":"Create PR"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":301,"cache_read_input_tokens":49373,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":301},"output_tokens":64,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"e0175717-b3d2-4a20-ae78-d8dc36390c5a","uuid":"e9400e64-6d31-4d11-94a5-c1334135db7e"}

Open PRs\n- None\n\n## Closed Recently\n- #85: Test coverage for Telegram and Discord API routes (69 new tests) — merged\n- #83: Code review round 5 — duplicate notifications, platform link timing, validation — merged + deployed\n- #81: Code review round 4 — email normalization, application state, rate limiter leak — merged + deployed\n- #79: Test coverage for listing CRUD, join, create routes — merged\n- #75: Code review fixes — navbar menu, validation, telegram/discord guards — merged + deployed","newString":"## Open PRs\n- None\n\n## Closed Recently\n- #87: Code review round 6 — logout fix, is_full reset, email subjects, webhook validation, fetch abort — merged + deployed\n- #85: Test coverage for Telegram and Discord API routes (69 new tests) — merged\n- #83: Code review round 5 — duplicate notifications, platform link timing, validation — merged + deployed\n- #81: Code review round 4 — email normalization, application state, rate limiter leak — merged + deployed\n- #79: Test coverage for listing CRUD, join, create routes — merged","originalFile":"# Agent Memory\n\n## Project\n- **Name**: Bookmate\n- **Repo**: https://github.com/TommyBrennan/bookmate\n- **Project Board**: Bookmate (project #1 on TommyBrennan)\n- **Tech**: Next.js 15, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, SQLite, iron-session\n- **Owner**: XanderZhu (human), TommyBrennan (GH account)\n\n## Current State\n- All PRD features implemented and merged (P0, P1, P2)\n- CI pipeline live: GitHub Actions runs lint + type check + build on push/PR to main\n- ESLint flat config with typescript-eslint, react-hooks, @next/eslint-plugin-next\n- Build passes clean, lint clean (no warnings)\n- Security hardening merged (PR #32, #36)\n- **Production deployed** via PM2 on port 3000 — http://89.167.127.85:3000\n- Health endpoint: `/api/health` (DB check, uptime, stats)\n- Custom 404 page (branded, with CTA)\n- OG + Twitter Card meta tags on listing pages (book cover, title, description)\n- Loading skeletons on all routes (root, listing detail, profile, notifications)\n- Error boundaries on all routes with retry functionality\n- Focus-visible styles for keyboard accessibility\n- **Accessibility improvements** (PR #49, merged + deployed):\n  - ARIA labels, roles, expanded states on all interactive elements\n  - Keyboard navigation on BookSearch dropdown (combobox pattern)\n  - autocomplete attributes on auth forms\n  - role=\"alert\" on error messages\n  - Skip-to-content link\n  - role=\"tablist\"/tab/tabpanel on profile tabs\n  - role=\"radiogroup\"/radio on format/platform buttons\n  - role=\"checkbox\" with keyboard support on approval toggle\n\n## Production\n- **URL**: http://89.167.127.85:3000\n- **Process manager**: PM2 (via npx)\n- **Config**: `app/ecosystem.config.js`\n- **Deploy script**: `scripts/deploy.sh`\n- **Logs**: `.claude-beat/logs/pm2-{out,error}.log`\n- **No reverse proxy** (nginx requires root — not available)\n- **No HTTPS** (no domain configured, no certbot)\n- PM2 process saved: `npx pm2 save` (restores on `pm2 resurrect`)\n\n## Open PRs\n- None\n\n## Closed Recently\n- #85: Test coverage for Telegram and Discord API routes (69 new tests) — merged\n- #83: Code review round 5 — duplicate notifications, platform link timing, validation — merged + deployed\n- #81: Code review round 4 — email normalization, application state, rate limiter leak — merged + deployed\n- #79: Test coverage for listing CRUD, join, create routes — merged\n- #75: Code review fixes — navbar menu, validation, telegram/discord guards — merged + deployed\n\n## Open Issues\n- #21: Telegram bot token (needs-human) — multiple follow-up reminders sent, still waiting\n- #54: **PAT expires ~March 27** (needs-human) — GH_TOKEN renewal required, ~4 days left\n\n## Important Notes\n- GH_TOKEN loaded from `.claude-beat/.env`\n- Remote URL includes PAT: reset with `git remote set-url` if needed\n- Next.js 15 used (not 16) due to Turbopack /root permission issue\n- agent-browser WORKS if: export XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/tmp/runtime-$(id -u) && mkdir -p \"$XDG_RUNTIME_DIR\"\n- agent-browser crashes after extended use (memory pressure) — keep recording sessions short, restart between scenes\n- ffmpeg installed as static binary in ~/bin — add to PATH: export PATH=\"$HOME/bin:$PATH\"\n- ELEVENLABS_API_KEY not available — demo video has no voiceover\n- Demo video at .claude-beat/logs/demos/demo_2026-03-20.mp4 (5 scenes, ~1:51)\n- SQLite DB stored in `app/data/` (gitignored)\n- DB tables: users, listings, listing_members, listing_applications, user_genres, notifications, ratings, telegram_chats, pending_telegram_groups\n- Telegram bot integration requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN env var (see issue #21)\n- Discord bot integration requires DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN + DISCORD_CLIENT_ID + DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET env vars\n- Listings have `platform_preference` field (telegram/discord)\n- Email notifications require SMTP env vars (SMTP_HOST, SMTP_PORT, SMTP_FROM, etc.)\n- nodemailer added as dependency for email sending\n- Session secret: lazy runtime check (not module-level) to avoid build failure\n- ESLint: use eslint v9 + @eslint/js v9 (not v10) to avoid peer dep conflicts\n- npm ci works cleanly (no --legacy-peer-deps needed)\n- No root/sudo access on server — can't install nginx, Docker, or system packages\n- PM2 available via npx (not globally installed)\n\n## Test Suite\n- 197 tests across 22 test files, all passing\n- Tested: auth (login, register), health, listings (browse, detail, create, join, edit, delete, telegram, discord, auto-telegram, auto-discord), notifications, profile, profile/genres, profile/reading, profile/reputation, ratings, rate-limit, telegram/setup, telegram/webhook, discord/setup, discord/webhook\n- All API routes now have test coverage\n- @vitest/coverage-v8 installed for coverage reporting\n\n## Components\n- `BookCover` — reusable book cover component with error fallback, uses `unoptimized` to bypass Next.js image proxy for Open Library covers that redirect through archive.org\n\n## Next Session Priority\n1. **URGENT**: PAT expires ~March 27 (#54) — ~4 days remaining, still needs-human\n2. Check issue #21 for Telegram token response\n3. Check production health\n4. All routes now tested — consider E2E testing, performance, or new feature proposals\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":44,"oldLines":11,"newStart":44,"newLines":11,"lines":[" - None"," "," ## Closed Recently","+- #87: Code review round 6 — logout fix, is_full reset, email subjects, webhook validation, fetch abort — merged + deployed"," - #85: Test coverage for Telegram and Discord API routes (69 new tests) — merged"," - #83: Code review round 5 — duplicate notifications, platform link timing, validation — merged + deployed"," - #81: Code review round 4 — email normalization, application state, rate limiter leak — merged + deployed"," - #79: Test coverage for listing CRUD, join, create routes — merged","-- #75: Code review fixes — navbar menu, validation, telegram/discord guards — merged + deployed"," "," ## Open Issues"," - #21: Telegram bot token (needs-human) — multiple follow-up reminders sent, still waiting"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

Check issue #21 for Telegram token response\n3. Check production health\n4. All routes now tested — consider E2E testing, performance, or new feature proposals","newString":"## Next Session Priority\n1. **URGENT**: PAT expires ~March 27 (#54) — ~3 days remaining, still needs-human\n2. Check issue #21 for Telegram token response\n3. Check production health\n4. All routes now tested — consider E2E testing, performance, or new feature proposals","originalFile":"# Agent Memory\n\n## Project\n- **Name**: Bookmate\n- **Repo**: https://github.com/TommyBrennan/bookmate\n- **Project Board**: Bookmate (project #1 on TommyBrennan)\n- **Tech**: Next.js 15, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, SQLite, iron-session\n- **Owner**: XanderZhu (human), TommyBrennan (GH account)\n\n## Current State\n- All PRD features implemented and merged (P0, P1, P2)\n- CI pipeline live: GitHub Actions runs lint + type check + build on push/PR to main\n- ESLint flat config with typescript-eslint, react-hooks, @next/eslint-plugin-next\n- Build passes clean, lint clean (no warnings)\n- Security hardening merged (PR #32, #36)\n- **Production deployed** via PM2 on port 3000 — http://89.167.127.85:3000\n- Health endpoint: `/api/health` (DB check, uptime, stats)\n- Custom 404 page (branded, with CTA)\n- OG + Twitter Card meta tags on listing pages (book cover, title, description)\n- Loading skeletons on all routes (root, listing detail, profile, notifications)\n- Error boundaries on all routes with retry functionality\n- Focus-visible styles for keyboard accessibility\n- **Accessibility improvements** (PR #49, merged + deployed):\n  - ARIA labels, roles, expanded states on all interactive elements\n  - Keyboard navigation on BookSearch dropdown (combobox pattern)\n  - autocomplete attributes on auth forms\n  - role=\"alert\" on error messages\n  - Skip-to-content link\n  - role=\"tablist\"/tab/tabpanel on profile tabs\n  - role=\"radiogroup\"/radio on format/platform buttons\n  - role=\"checkbox\" with keyboard support on approval toggle\n\n## Production\n- **URL**: http://89.167.127.85:3000\n- **Process manager**: PM2 (via npx)\n- **Config**: `app/ecosystem.config.js`\n- **Deploy script**: `scripts/deploy.sh`\n- **Logs**: `.claude-beat/logs/pm2-{out,error}.log`\n- **No reverse proxy** (nginx requires root — not available)\n- **No HTTPS** (no domain configured, no certbot)\n- PM2 process saved: `npx pm2 save` (restores on `pm2 resurrect`)\n\n## Open PRs\n- None\n\n## Closed Recently\n- #87: Code review round 6 — logout fix, is_full reset, email subjects, webhook validation, fetch abort — merged + deployed\n- #85: Test coverage for Telegram and Discord API routes (69 new tests) — merged\n- #83: Code review round 5 — duplicate notifications, platform link timing, validation — merged + deployed\n- #81: Code review round 4 — email normalization, application state, rate limiter leak — merged + deployed\n- #79: Test coverage for listing CRUD, join, create routes — merged\n\n## Open Issues\n- #21: Telegram bot token (needs-human) — multiple follow-up reminders sent, still waiting\n- #54: **PAT expires ~March 27** (needs-human) — GH_TOKEN renewal required, ~4 days left\n\n## Important Notes\n- GH_TOKEN loaded from `.claude-beat/.env`\n- Remote URL includes PAT: reset with `git remote set-url` if needed\n- Next.js 15 used (not 16) due to Turbopack /root permission issue\n- agent-browser WORKS if: export XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/tmp/runtime-$(id -u) && mkdir -p \"$XDG_RUNTIME_DIR\"\n- agent-browser crashes after extended use (memory pressure) — keep recording sessions short, restart between scenes\n- ffmpeg installed as static binary in ~/bin — add to PATH: export PATH=\"$HOME/bin:$PATH\"\n- ELEVENLABS_API_KEY not available — demo video has no voiceover\n- Demo video at .claude-beat/logs/demos/demo_2026-03-20.mp4 (5 scenes, ~1:51)\n- SQLite DB stored in `app/data/` (gitignored)\n- DB tables: users, listings, listing_members, listing_applications, user_genres, notifications, ratings, telegram_chats, pending_telegram_groups\n- Telegram bot integration requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN env var (see issue #21)\n- Discord bot integration requires DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN + DISCORD_CLIENT_ID + DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET env vars\n- Listings have `platform_preference` field (telegram/discord)\n- Email notifications require SMTP env vars (SMTP_HOST, SMTP_PORT, SMTP_FROM, etc.)\n- nodemailer added as dependency for email sending\n- Session secret: lazy runtime check (not module-level) to avoid build failure\n- ESLint: use eslint v9 + @eslint/js v9 (not v10) to avoid peer dep conflicts\n- npm ci works cleanly (no --legacy-peer-deps needed)\n- No root/sudo access on server — can't install nginx, Docker, or system packages\n- PM2 available via npx (not globally installed)\n\n## Test Suite\n- 197 tests across 22 test files, all passing\n- Tested: auth (login, register), health, listings (browse, detail, create, join, edit, delete, telegram, discord, auto-telegram, auto-discord), notifications, profile, profile/genres, profile/reading, profile/reputation, ratings, rate-limit, telegram/setup, telegram/webhook, discord/setup, discord/webhook\n- All API routes now have test coverage\n- @vitest/coverage-v8 installed for coverage reporting\n\n## Components\n- `BookCover` — reusable book cover component with error fallback, uses `unoptimized` to bypass Next.js image proxy for Open Library covers that redirect through archive.org\n\n## Next Session Priority\n1. **URGENT**: PAT expires ~March 27 (#54) — ~4 days remaining, still needs-human\n2. Check issue #21 for Telegram token response\n3. Check production health\n4. All routes now tested — consider E2E testing, performance, or new feature proposals\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":86,"oldLines":7,"newStart":86,"newLines":7,"lines":[" - `BookCover` — reusable book cover component with error fallback, uses `unoptimized` to bypass Next.js image proxy for Open Library covers that redirect through archive.org"," "," ## Next Session Priority","-1. **URGENT**: PAT expires ~March 27 (#54) — ~4 days remaining, still needs-human","+1. **URGENT**: PAT expires ~March 27 (#54) — ~3 days remaining, still needs-human"," 2. Check issue #21 for Telegram token response"," 3. Check production health"," 4. All routes now tested — consider E2E testing, performance, or new feature proposals"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01Mm4vo7BvLmwvPMm13tCtMP","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01CEcibV971tZRr7aLFNUNvj","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/logs/session-2026-03-23-2300.md","content":"# Session Log — 2026-03-23 23:00 UTC\n\n## Summary\nCode review round 6: found and fixed 5 bugs including a critical logout failure. Created issue #86, implemented fixes in PR #87, CI passed, merged to main, deployed to production.\n\n## Review Findings\n- **Production**: Healthy — HTTP 200, PM2 online (112min uptime), 197 tests pass\n- **CI**: Green on main\n- **Open PRs**: None\n- **Open issues**: #54 (needs-human, PAT expiry ~3 days), #21 (needs-human, Telegram token)\n- **Emails**: Issue #74 notifications (already closed), NomadLingo issues (different project), Google Workspace promo\n- **PRD sync**: All PRD features have corresponding closed issues\n\n## Work Completed\n\n### Issue #86: Code review round 6 (PR #87 — merged + deployed)\n\n5 bugs fixed:\n\n1. **`session.destroy()` not awaited** (CRITICAL) — In `logout/route.ts` and `me/route.ts`, `session.destroy()` is async but was called without `await`. The cookie was never cleared, so users remained logged in until the 7-day session expiry. Fixed by adding `await`.\n\n2. **`is_full` not reset on group resize** (CRITICAL) — When an author increased `maxGroupSize` on a previously-full listing, `is_full` stayed `1` and the listing remained permanently invisible in browse. Fixed by checking member count vs new size in the PATCH handler and resetting `is_full = 0` when appropriate.\n\n3. **Missing email subject cases** (IMPORTANT) — `telegram_ready` and `discord_ready` notification types fell through to generic \"Bookmate: Notification\" subject. Added proper subject lines.\n\n4. **Discord webhook `listingId` validation** (IMPORTANT) — `handleLink` accepted non-integer/negative `listingId` values. Added integer validation consistent with other routes.\n\n5. **BookSearch fetch race condition** (IMPORTANT) — Added `AbortController` to cancel in-flight Open Library API requests on component unmount or rapid query changes, preventing stale responses from overwriting newer results.\n\nAll existing 197 tests pass, ESLint clean, build clean, CI green.\n\n## Issues Monitored\n- **#54 (PAT expiry)**: ~3 days remaining — critical, needs-human\n- **#21 (Telegram token)**: Still needs-human\n\n## Next Session Priority\n1. Check production health\n2. Monitor PAT expiry (#54) — critical\n3. Consider E2E testing, performance improvements, or new feature proposals\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":753,"cache_read_input_tokens":52613,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":753},"output_tokens":53,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"e0175717-b3d2-4a20-ae78-d8dc36390c5a","uuid":"a34226c1-cbb3-481c-9fd9-90bd9fe0d432"}

Created issue #86, implemented fixes in PR #87, CI passed, merged to main, deployed to production.\n\n## Review Findings\n- **Production**: Healthy — HTTP 200, PM2 online (112min uptime), 197 tests pass\n- **CI**: Green on main\n- **Open PRs**: None\n- **Open issues**: #54 (needs-human, PAT expiry ~3 days), #21 (needs-human, Telegram token)\n- **Emails**: Issue #74 notifications (already closed), NomadLingo issues (different project), Google Workspace promo\n- **PRD sync**: All PRD features have corresponding closed issues\n\n## Work Completed\n\n### Issue #86: Code review round 6 (PR #87 — merged + deployed)\n\n5 bugs fixed:\n\n1. **`session.destroy()` not awaited** (CRITICAL) — In `logout/route.ts` and `me/route.ts`, `session.destroy()` is async but was called without `await`. The cookie was never cleared, so users remained logged in until the 7-day session expiry. Fixed by adding `await`.\n\n2. **`is_full` not reset on group resize** (CRITICAL) — When an author increased `maxGroupSize` on a previously-full listing, `is_full` stayed `1` and the listing remained permanently invisible in browse. Fixed by checking member count vs new size in the PATCH handler and resetting `is_full = 0` when appropriate.\n\n3. **Missing email subject cases** (IMPORTANT) — `telegram_ready` and `discord_ready` notification types fell through to generic \"Bookmate: Notification\" subject. Added proper subject lines.\n\n4. **Discord webhook `listingId` validation** (IMPORTANT) — `handleLink` accepted non-integer/negative `listingId` values. Added integer validation consistent with other routes.\n\n5. **BookSearch fetch race condition** (IMPORTANT) — Added `AbortController` to cancel in-flight Open Library API requests on component unmount or rapid query changes, preventing stale responses from overwriting newer results.\n\nAll existing 197 tests pass, ESLint clean, build clean, CI green.\n\n## Issues Monitored\n- **#54 (PAT expiry)**: ~3 days remaining — critical, needs-human\n- **#21 (Telegram token)**: Still needs-human\n\n## Next Session Priority\n1. Check production health\n2. Monitor PAT expiry (#54) — critical\n3. Consider E2E testing, performance improvements, or new feature proposals\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null}}

Users remained \""}},"session_id":"e0175717-b3d2-4a20-ae78-d8dc36390c5a","parent_tool_use_id":null,"uuid":"0d5f2dff-030d-4d35-861b-947154db017d"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01E6737exAxVWnQgACofRf62","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"## Session Complete\n\n**What I did this session:**\n\nFound and fixed **5 bugs** in code review round 6 (issue #86, PR #87):\n\n1. **🔴 CRITICAL: Logout was broken** — `session.destroy()` wasn't awaited, so the session cookie was never actually cleared. Users remained \"logged in\" until the 7-day cookie expired naturally.\n\n2. **🔴 CRITICAL: Full listings got permanently stuck** — Increasing `maxGroupSize` on a full listing never reset `is_full`, leaving it invisible in browse forever.\n\n3. **🟡 Missing email subjects** — `telegram_ready` and `discord_ready` notifications used the generic \"Bookmate: Notification\" subject instead of descriptive ones.\n\n4. **🟡 Discord webhook validation gap** — `listingId` wasn't validated as a positive integer, inconsistent with every other route.\n\n5. **🟡 BookSearch fetch race condition** — Added `AbortController` to prevent stale API responses from overwriting newer results on rapid typing.\n\nAll 197 tests pass, CI green, deployed to production. Production health confirmed.\n\n**Monitoring:** PAT expiry (#54) ~3 days remaining, Telegram token (#21) still awaiting human response."}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":305,"cache_read_input_tokens":54132,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":305},"output_tokens":2,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"e0175717-b3d2-4a20-ae78-d8dc36390c5a","uuid":"ab094897-ce62-4641-b578-e982d57065b9"}

{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"duration_ms":494412,"duration_api_ms":347062,"num_turns":56,"result":"## Session Complete\n\n**What I did this session:**\n\nFound and fixed **5 bugs** in code review round 6 (issue #86, PR #87):\n\n1. **🔴 CRITICAL: Logout was broken** — `session.destroy()` wasn't awaited, so the session cookie was never actually cleared. Users remained \"logged in\" until the 7-day cookie expired naturally.\n\n2. **🔴 CRITICAL: Full listings got permanently stuck** — Increasing `maxGroupSize` on a full listing never reset `is_full`, leaving it invisible in browse forever.\n\n3. **🟡 Missing email subjects** — `telegram_ready` and `discord_ready` notifications used the generic \"Bookmate: Notification\" subject instead of descriptive ones.\n\n4. **🟡 Discord webhook validation gap** — `listingId` wasn't validated as a positive integer, inconsistent with every other route.\n\n5. **🟡 BookSearch fetch race condition** — Added `AbortController` to prevent stale API responses from overwriting newer results on rapid typing.\n\nAll 197 tests pass, CI green, deployed to production.
